name: Sen. Ron Johnson
subject: Message from Ron
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
What it's going to take to win next year Peter,We're only ONE seat away from taking back the Senate. We're only FIVE seats away from taking back the House.**But this is going to be a MASSIVE battle - _take it from me!_**_ _ The radical liberals in D.C. and the big-money donors across the country are TERRIFIED of losing full control over Washington - so they're going to do everything they can to keep it! **That means that we need to step up NOW to defend conservative patriots like ****Scott Fitzgerald**** with our FULL and IMMEDIATE support! ** [JOIN RON JOHNSON - Support Scott Fitzgerald >>>](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cghkid-ahkdjtlkr-r/) [CLICK HERE - TAKE BACK THE MAJORITY! >>>](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cghkid-ahkdjtlkr-y/) I've worked with Scott Fitzgerald since before I was first elected in 2010.In Wisconsin, we've known Scott as a leader who gets RESULTS - like leading the charge on union reform, Voter ID, billions in tax relief, and so much more.He's earned our trust, and he's earned our support. When you sent him to Congress, you sent a worker who has joined me in fighting for the**sanctity of our elections** , putting **America First** , and BLOCKING the very worst of the **radical liberal agenda.** I'm writing because next fall, we have the chance to win back the House AND the Senate - **[_but only if we step up and MAKE it happen!_](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cghkid-ahkdjtlkr-j/)** That means conservatives won't just be hanging on for dear life, hoping to prevent the worst - we're going to be DRIVING the agenda and taking back our country! **[Can I count on you?](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cghkid-ahkdjtlkr-t/)** [Back Scott Fitzgerald and Take Back the House & Senate!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cghkid-ahkdjtlkr-i/) Thanks,Ron Johnson
U.S. Senator [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cghkid-ahkdjtlkr-k/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cghkid-ahkdjtlkr-u/) | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
P.O. Box 5048, Elm Grove, WI 53122 [Preferences](https://scottfitzgerald.updatemyprofile.com/t-cghkid-62D8F9CE-ahkdjtlkr-o) | [Unsubscribe](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-u-cghkid-ahkdjtlkr-b/)

Far-right talking points. He even said he'd "absolutely" welcome the twice-impeached former president on the campaign trail. This is what we're up against, Derek, and it's only the beginning. The worst part is that with Senate control on the line, the full force of the GOP establishment and their dark money allies will pour millions into Florida to prop up Marco Rubio, and Trump will be fanning the flames every step of the way. **That's why we've got to build a grassroots movement that can fight back, here and now, and all the way to the finish line. Every dollar you contribute helps us build the strongest campaign possible to defeat Marco Rubio and protect our Democratic Senate majority.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFId3QL9vh9vz6Rt0Yh7gWK6Laxz3aQhXc2aIiOVfektP1gjWrSVrJr69FQRtXmLUmgT7pCtE_yFGSZnkuCFE8NW7iu_g_GYvoFKK6oz7KSaChmukyTc7G-YXQgUdwumwUZ5Va50WaVRlJWIw6wOjn2TBjYZ4dbWLIdT9wjQYO6QtJTRogidzuYPB6_uC9LVWQO__sWyEAzN4CTbG3A0oMfr2Ze3XCCnyNZA2USrLJiNPkpT5PI5rQXWHsJiGRXBZ4us0MDmqo34P5StyS2g1o2E6M9_qA1POtJImPgiz3Un4i/3f1/0ZWFOe5gTdOgAiRDtgOKrw/h2/2WbwcsdBGlw0IrfVRBOA0SSALMh92Ji--63we0rCuok) Thanks for stepping up and having my back from the very beginning, Derek. name: Sheriff Joe
subject: Joe Biden’s America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WE WANT TRUMP
body:
America wants Donald Trump to be our President in 2024. Let’s make sure that happens. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2d35bf7697254407a7a2a7c248d3dbd7&_e=PDxmrgesyVOXe9htjptAlCbwuubb_dav2s047lDlRhR3qpXjpk7cugnh9oxm4700A0PjMCNSNMxyWujZ-yGb9Z5-5v9NYjtDFNj55vGv1YESopG8iWxsc2DLLUThj2Nz8ULPrpcEUmGDYQ857uu226KzCndEYQkniddGMsQ3sknqTyVuHs2f87Bzmj9TBuMDJUiGq5X66WercHR2UlQWmk89D9B161-74npy-W3juofAamAtXZBycRo0R2f1vaCiQylO55lHYUl9W6UPh377i7VRIpL8yIQJHFQCQsEehB-qidHVB8wtiVOwLnN97I9jEAGJVC3RyfEN-IejqhQXC3oFHQQchkRRK7erbsvZsaTO-TRTSJnPfOadfNm7OxNK1B0RzejW7TVaeDNEeITnNlxSHkDbSPtvL6qWmFQSmP8c1BzkqPNysBjELKuH0BRK)

---
Fellow Conservative,

Failed economic policies, skyrocketing crime rates, out-of-control inflation, and a federal government that allows thousands of illegal immigrants with COVID-19 to pour across our borders _**every single DAY.**_

**THAT IS JOE BIDEN’S AMERICA.**
Last year we saw short-sighted people who voted for Biden just because he wasn’t “mean” or brutally honest like Trump, and they got a career politician who blames others. They are regretting their choice, and **they want Trump back as President in 2024.**

**I’ve been called "America's Toughest Sheriff" and that’s why I’m leading the** _**We Want Trump PAC**_ **because we can’t allow crime, corruption, and lazy politicians to ruin our nation.**

I’m a Korean War veteran. I spent my entire life in law enforcement from being a director of DEA at home and abroad to being Sheriff of Maricopa County, Arizona. When it comes to the safety and security of my fellow Americans, I don’t play games - and neither does Donald Trump. [**That’s why we need to lay the groundwork for his re-election in 2024 starting TODAY.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2d35bf7697254407a7a2a7c248d3dbd7&_e=PDxmrgesyVOXe9htjptAlCbwuubb_dav2s047lDlRhR3qpXjpk7cugnh9oxm4700A0PjMCNSNMxyWujZ-yGb9Z5-5v9NYjtDFNj55vGv1YESopG8iWxsc2DLLUThj2Nz8ULPrpcEUmGDYQ857uu226KzCndEYQkniddGMsQ3sknqTyVuHs2f87Bzmj9TBuMDJUiGq5X66WercHR2UlQWmvpQwnU5pTMuh76M54fRh_gu25G6QHsAad_y07LJuLNfep-a77XOf6n4xjtRKechbZ6slztUISL-3-FwI2-kuD1pnNUHH2Fjt93RIyX49rFFphBMwPHOsfodBVBqplgUAQIfd_QWFXVKLPu7cfk07l2dbcZGmXxfvkwhkoln6PGrt0diQ52lE4cWubzwTAZktSfzlm4DFotUFq4_oXPNCePeQomhsuVDcC4JETn-SUf3)

[** ****AMERICA WANTS DONALD TRUMP, DO YOU? **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2d35bf7697254407a7a2a7c248d3dbd7&_e=PDxmrgesyVOXe9htjptAlCbwuubb_dav2s047lDlRhR3qpXjpk7cugnh9oxm4700A0PjMCNSNMxyWujZ-yGb9Z5-5v9NYjtDFNj55vGv1YESopG8iWxsc2DLLUThj2Nz8ULPrpcEUmGDYQ857uu226KzCndEYQkniddGMsQ3sknqTyVuHs2f87Bzmj9TBuMDJUiGq5X66WercHR2UlQWmnsZNSclQSxXEYhV0je07OU3o_-zyk1H5JWHsxjtCf26bqzFimJ-g_yHqqyDckZLE4ShiVoE81FRkJrjwX9PficexR1v9FxEjj8Evr6C8pPa2lvB3JGSfnlPQOXdbTwmYe-8JxkPFSm4NGKzy-ZzoJzW9LbsON6vfGhpGyX4NLiAfzGImH479f3i1s4vUgGhcXGkP4rkFZxg1sBd18WeNBltOmxEdO5bLx0Dq9HDNKDp)
_Joe Biden has already served nearly 40 years in politics_ , yet just a few months into “his presidency,” he’s already torching our country and running it into the ground. We cannot allow unemployment to stay at record highs, crime at record highs, or surging inflation that’s causing gas and grocery prices to skyrocket while Biden grabs ice cream and goes on vacation.

If you’re happy with Joe Biden, _then forget I emailed you._

But, if you’re sick of what Biden is doing to this country, [**then take action with me and let’s start winning back this nation for Trump.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2d35bf7697254407a7a2a7c248d3dbd7&_e=PDxmrgesyVOXe9htjptAlCbwuubb_dav2s047lDlRhR3qpXjpk7cugnh9oxm4700A0PjMCNSNMxyWujZ-yGb9Z5-5v9NYjtDFNj55vGv1YESopG8iWxsc2DLLUThj2Nz8ULPrpcEUmGDYQ857uu226KzCndEYQkniddGMsQ3sknqTyVuHs2f87Bzmj9TBuMDJUiGq5X66WercHR2UlQWmoZcQJWCs2Bt7_6yutDc5jn4hi9SxUeJxUPO34xqgp8oy9DfLh9jMuo7hLwgMtDbh6er7dqxYk2qDLqe5KmbFngHJfD17Dq9jpOJedoFUccPVn_sVCsLC_B_jgX50VrPjcYE3ChXg0CAEzaJF62AIqzlyEkwj7rVW8Xl06kxZlQv0kD94K8nbuu3nt5K_cpxqgcm25YZyFMKNUAR_teZSIjwq28jUSvvha7wqTpcOaye) It starts in places like Arizona, Wisconsin, Michigan, Ohio, and North Carolina. [**It starts with just $10 or $20 to help pave the way for Trump.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2d35bf7697254407a7a2a7c248d3dbd7&_e=PDxmrgesyVOXe9htjptAlCbwuubb_dav2s047lDlRhR3qpXjpk7cugnh9oxm4700A0PjMCNSNMxyWujZ-yGb9Z5-5v9NYjtDFNj55vGv1YESopG8iWxsc2DLLUThj2Nz8ULPrpcEUmGDYQ857uu226KzCndEYQkniddGMsQ3sknqTyVuHs2f87Bzmj9TBuMDJUiGq5X66WercHR2UlQWmtxmX2kpfVmTnkpX4JeK7cWZsatjGRQihVpc5xKazuqmw5NMW-M4QlNevkRXZp9aqPnNmjkMVa2eEfgoyyZIWIWwEJnYu3Y4QzBKqM8Y_7RmTxYlc_2b9GVc-7gSk_yePBp5xC-4kvDNnFNKLi5waA7ThoHFEHsFANij1YqE-7-uI4qTgYnhXzCQxRl8CahUJW0cJ5FYr6dwKsIHlVZCD5vg9lF3d0dg2PW1uM8iLGW8)

**Fellow Conservative, if you want to see Donald Trump back in the White House in 2024, then help me get America to say “WE WANT TRUMP”** [**by donating today.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2d35bf7697254407a7a2a7c248d3dbd7&_e=PDxmrgesyVOXe9htjptAlCbwuubb_dav2s047lDlRhR3qpXjpk7cugnh9oxm4700A0PjMCNSNMxyWujZ-yGb9Z5-5v9NYjtDFNj55vGv1YESopG8iWxsc2DLLUThj2Nz8ULPrpcEUmGDYQ857uu226KzCndEYQkniddGMsQ3sknqTyVuHs2f87Bzmj9TBuMDJUiGq5X66WercHR2UlQWmgBjOVoyY6U7-OcF4r0kKMWK0XyJHtToB7F_aDntqWh4k0wUwkeZhzt81W9QDlKPk9MkHQd3Rm1V-RVQGWSwwwQA-aO2UB5I9PbSml27LfisUenXy7SzuopaCfcqFg4nznezVoCsCSo8tzp4JdFLseFibtPdCV8FltGo35pioQKPequcKdWvXfvXlr3Jwxu3kPBelKIndl_tmibiJ6eEIBV2SxahJ0zWadmCD3CW5Uh1)

Thank you,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2d35bf7697254407a7a2a7c248d3dbd7&_e=PDxmrgesyVOXe9htjptAlCbwuubb_dav2s047lDlRhR3qpXjpk7cugnh9oxm4700A0PjMCNSNMxyWujZ-yGb9Z5-5v9NYjtDFNj55vGv1YESopG8iWxsc2DLLUThj2Nz8ULPrpcEUmGDYQ857uu226KzCndEYQkniddGMsQ3sknqTyVuHs2f87Bzmj9TBuMDJUiGq5X66WercHR2UlQWmk2Sl3ScjBWwUq8CxeY0nnVWLMe9okGMe27Y3j-d74DOG5K47AtG6_tnYvu5n7w_yXx1eiNbvwxSsIpD7Wh0X-yhk022irAuCH45Z18mFwBG-mMaVpQz0JDVGZcVumkSU6Y4ywDMNmNSMhUuOg1e2kA3ruQWrjd7OBchKhRjhyvxB8WPIaBBEn-3m-usJxqR6dntgjwz-uJLW8hh2YplECqaUQ3I_o1d5D4gwXQ3SD7k)

Fellow Conservative, if you want to see Donald Trump back in the White House in 2024, then help me get America to say “WE WANT TRUMP” Thank you, Sheriff Joe America’s Toughest Sheriff Chairman, We Want Trump PAC | | PAID FOR BY WE WANT TRUMP. name: Tom Fitton
subject: Covid Emails Cover-Up?
body:
Obamagate in Federal Court

[INSIDE JW]

Judicial Watch Goes to Federal Court To Battle for Key Document Used
to Justify Obama Spying on Trump

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56616&L=25749&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1xRGxPZTY0WGw1ZyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDkwNDAxMjAzMg==]

We were in court this week arguing for the right of the people to
know the extent of corruption in the FBI when it accused President
Trump of conspiring with Russia. That fraudulent notion has long been
discredited, but virtually all of those responsible have not been held
to account or even exposed.

U.S. District Court Judge Carl J. Nichols ordered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56616&L=25750&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWhlYXJpbmctb3JkZXItMDI3NDMvI19ibGFuaz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDkwNDAxMjAzMg==]
a
hearing in our FOIA lawsuit involving the full declassification and
release of the “electronic communication” (EC) that officially
launched the counterintelligence investigation, termed “Crossfire
Hurricane,” of President Trump’s 2016 presidential campaign.

The hearing addressed our argument against the Department of
Justice’s attempt to close the case and withhold a full, unredacted
version of the EC. In May 2020 we obtained
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56616&L=25751&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvZGVjbGFzc2lmaWNhdGlvbi1zcHlvcGVyYXRpb24vI19ibGFuaz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDkwNDAxMjAzMg==]
a
redacted version of the EC, which was written entirely by former FBI
official Peter Strzok.

We filed the September 2019 FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56616&L=25752&F=T&]
after
the DOJ and FBI both failed to respond to identical July 11, 2019,
FOIA requests, which asked for access to a single record: “The
Electronic Communication that initiated the counterintelligence
investigation of President Trump’s 2016 presidential campaign.”
(_Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Justice
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56616&L=25753&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWVsZWN0cm9uaWMtY29tbXMtY291bnRlcmludGVsLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMjc0My8jX2JsYW5rXV8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA5MDQwMTIwMzI=
(No.
1:19-cv-02743))

In its effort to close the case, the Biden DOJ argues that there is
not significant public interest in the full contents of the EC that
initiated the counterintelligence investigation of former President
Trump’s campaign and Russian interference in the 2016 elections.

We filed a motion
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56616&L=25754&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWNyb3NzZmlyZS1odXJyaWNhbmUtY3Jvc3MtbW90aW9uLTAyNzQzLyNfYmxhbms/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA5MDQwMTIwMzI=]
countering
that, “Disclosure of the full EC advances the public’s right to
know what the government did, who was involved, and why the
investigation into Trump and Russian interference was necessary.”

We cited two declarations from Kevin Brock, former assistant director
of the Directorate of Intelligence and former principal deputy
director of the National Counterterrorism Center (NCTC) for the FBI.
Brock testified that it is not standard procedure to have an EC
drafted, approved, and sent to and from the exact same agent and that
this is a violation of FBI oversight protocols:

In the EC document here, the “From” line indicates the EC – and
authorization to begin an investigation as required under FBI policy
– is from a part of the FBI’s Counterintelligence Division. The
contact listed is Peter Strzok. The EC was drafted by Peter Strzok.
The EC was approved by Peter Strzok. On the face of the document
produced, it appears the EC that initiated a criminal FARA
investigation of unidentified members of the Trump presidential
campaign was created by Peter Strzok, approved by Peter Strzok, and
sent from Peter Strzok to Peter Strzok. This is not usual procedure.

FBI policy prohibits an agent from initiating and approving his or her
own case. Such action violates FBI oversight protocols put in place to
protect the American people from an FBI agent acting unilaterally.

***

In fact, the EC does not identify any individual by name as a target
of the investigation. It does not articulate any factors that address
the elements of FARA as required by routine FBI policy and procedure
and the Attorney General Guidelines and, therefore, does not contain
sufficient justification for initiating an investigation into USPERs
[U.S. persons].

Based upon my experience, no reasonable and experienced FBI
counterintelligence squad supervisor in the field would have approved
the EC at issue here – as released – which opened the Crossfire
Hurricane investigation.

The unredacted information released in the EC document here offers no
legitimate predication justifying the investigation of USPERs involved
in a presidential campaign or subsequent FISA intercept of a U.S.
citizen

The corruption is real and we’re not going to let the DC
establishment consign this shameful episode to the memory hole. We
expect a court decision in a few months...

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES HHS FOR DIRECTOR’S EMAILS ON CHINA AND COVID
RESEARCH

Our government’s medical bureaucrats seem determined to obscure
their entanglement with China and coronavirus research before the
pandemic struck. We’re equally determined to get to the bottom of
it.

We filed a FOIA lawsuit against the Department of Health and Human
Services (HHS) for all emails of National Institutes of Health
Director Francis Collins related to gain of function research,
hydroxychloroquine and the Wuhan Institute of Virology (_Judicial
Watch v U.S. Department of Health and Human Services_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56616&L=25755&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLWhjcS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDIzMDIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwOTA0MDEyMDMy]
(No.
1:21-cv-02302)).

We sued after the National Institutes of Health failed to respond to
our June 8, 2021, FOIA request for:

All emails sent to and from Director Francis Collins related to
“gain of function”, “hydroxychloroquine”, “HCQ”, and/or
“Wuhan Institute of Virology.”

When challenged about whether the National Institutes of Health
supported gain of function research, Collins released a statement on
May 19, 2021, claiming
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56616&L=25756&F=T&

Based on outbreaks of coronaviruses caused by animal to human
transmissions such as in Asia in 2003 that caused Severe Acute
Respiratory Syndrome
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56616&L=25757&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2hvLmludC9oZWFsdGgtdG9waWNzL3NldmVyZS1hY3V0ZS1yZXNwaXJhdG9yeS1zeW5kcm9tZSNfYmxhbms/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA5MDQwMTIwMzI=]
(SARS),
and in Saudi Arabia in 2012 that caused Middle East Respiratory
Syndrome
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56616&L=25758&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2hvLmludC9oZWFsdGgtdG9waWNzL21pZGRsZS1lYXN0LXJlc3BpcmF0b3J5LXN5bmRyb21lLWNvcm9uYXZpcnVzLW1lcnMjX2JsYW5rP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwOTA0MDEyMDMy]
(MERS),
NIH and the National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases
(NIAID) have for many years supported grants to learn more about
viruses lurking in bats and other mammals that have the potential to
spill over to humans and cause widespread disease. However, neither
NIH nor NIAID have ever approved any grant that would have supported
‘gain-of-function’ research on coronaviruses that would have
increased their transmissibility or lethality for humans.

An August 26, 2021, report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56616&L=25759&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnBvc3QuY29tL25hdGlvbi9pbnRlcmFjdGl2ZS8yMDIxL2Etc2NpZW5jZS1pbi10aGUtc2hhZG93cy8jX2JsYW5rP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwOTA0MDEyMDMy]
by
the _Washington Post_ claims the NIH has been funding gain of
function research for years. Gain of function
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56616&L=25760&F=T&.]
research
involves experimentation that aims to increase the transmissibility
and/or virulence of pathogens. According to the report:

In the United States, NIH Director Francis S. Collins and Anthony S.
Fauci, director of the agency’s National Institute of Allergy and
Infectious Diseases, have led the federal funding and oversight of
gain-of-function research.

Eight years ago, Collins and Fauci helped put in place high-level
reviews and other safeguards in response to concerns raised by Relman
[David A. Relman, a Stanford University physician and microbiologist]
and aides to President Barack Obama, who were alarmed by what they saw
as insufficient scrutiny of the research with ferrets. The NIH leaders
and the Department of Health and Human Services pledged to subject the
work to increased transparency and vetting. This included forming a
review group of federal officials — known informally as a “Ferrets
Committee” — to vet proposed projects for safety and worthiness.

However, Collins and Fauci in recent years have helped shape policy
changes, directly and through their aides, that undercut the
committee’s authority, according to federal documents, congressional
testimony and interviews with dozens of present and former officials
and science experts.

***

Since then, the experiments have continued to unfold amid secrecy, and
HHS, which administers the review committee, has kept its work
confidential: No agendas, meeting minutes or other records of its
proceedings are public. Even the names of the federal officials
assigned to serve on the committee, which has spanned the Obama, Trump
and Biden administrations, are kept secret

On Sunday, March 7, 2021, Collins argued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56616&L=25761&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2JzbmV3cy5jb20vbmV3cy9jb3ZpZC0xOS1yZXB1cnBvc2VkLWRydWdzLTYwLW1pbnV0ZXMtMjAyMS0wMy0wNy8jX2JsYW5rP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwOTA0MDEyMDMy]
to
CBS News that hydroxychloroquine was a “bust:”

“Basically it was a bust ... maybe it got in the way of trying other
kinds of repurposed drugs. All the enthusiasm about hydroxychloroquine
was basically dependent on anecdotal reports,” Collins said. “And
that did leave everybody with kind of a sour taste in their mouths ...
we had to get over that. I think we're over it now.”

Bottom line: The NIH, our nation’s medical research agency, is in
full cover-up mode about the COVID-19 controversies and politics.
Where are the emails?

Our “big dig” into this issue is well underway with respect to Dr.
Fauci.

On August 25, 2021, we made public 129 pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56616&L=25762&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvbmV3LWZhdWNpLWVtYWlscy8jX2JsYW5rP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwOTA0MDEyMDMy]
of records from HHS that included an “urgent for Dr. Fauci”
email chain which cites ties between the Wuhan lab and the
taxpayer-funded EcoHealth Alliance. The government emails also
reported that the foundation of U.S. billionaire Bill Gates worked
closely with the Chinese government to pave the way for
Chinese-produced medications to be sold outside China and help
“raise China’s voice of governance by placing representatives from
China on important international counsels as high level commitment
from China.

In July, we obtained records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56616&L=25763&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvd3VoYW4tbGFiLWZhdWNpLWdyYW50cy8jX2JsYW5rP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwOTA0MDEyMDMy]
from
NIAID officials in connection with the Wuhan Institute of Virology
revealing significant collaborations and funding that began in 2014.
The records revealed that NIAID gave nine China-related grants
to EcoHealth Alliance
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56616&L=25764&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZWNvaGVhbHRoYWxsaWFuY2Uub3JnLyNfYmxhbms/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA5MDQwMTIwMzI=]
to
research coronavirus emergence in bats and was the NIH’s top issuer
of grants to the Wuhan lab itself.

Also in July, we uncovered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56616&L=25765&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvY2RjLWZhY2Vib29rLWNvdmlkLW1lc3NhZ2dpbmcvI19ibGFuaz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDkwNDAxMjAzMg==]
CDC
records revealing that Facebook coordinated closely with the CDC to
control the COVID narrative and “misinformation” and that over
$3.5 million in free advertising has been given to the CDC by social
media companies.

In June, we announced that we had filed FOIA lawsuits
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56616&L=25766&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctZm9pYS1jb3ZpZC13dWhhbi8jX2JsYW5rP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwOTA0MDEyMDMy]
against
the Office of the Director of National Intelligence (ODNI) and the
State Department for information on the Wuhan Institute of Virology
and the origins of the SARS-CoV-2 virus.

Also in June, we obtained records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56616&L=25767&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvZmF1Y2ktd3VoYW4tODI2ay8jX2JsYW5rP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwOTA0MDEyMDMy]
from
HHS revealing that from 2014 to 2019, $826,277 was given to the Wuhan
Institute of Virology for bat coronavirus research by the NIAID.

In March, we publicly released
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56616&L=25768&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvZW1haWxzLXdoby10ZXJtcy8jX2JsYW5rP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwOTA0MDEyMDMy]
emails
and other records of Fauci and Dr. H. Clifford Lane
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56616&L=25769&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmlhaWQubmloLmdvdi9hYm91dC9oLWNsaWZmb3JkLWxhbmUtbWQtYmlvI19ibGFuaz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDkwNDAxMjAzMg==]
from
HHS showing that NIH officials tailored confidentiality forms to
China’s terms and that the WHO conducted an unreleased, “strictly
confidential” COVID-19 epidemiological analysis in January 2020.
Additionally, the emails reveal an independent journalist in China
pointing out the inconsistent COVID numbers in China to NIH’s
National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases’ Deputy
Director for Clinical Research and Special Projects Lane.

In October 2020, we uncovered emails
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56616&L=25770&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvZmF1Y2ktZW1haWxzLyNfYmxhbms/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA5MDQwMTIwMzI=]
showing
a WHO entity pushing for a press release, approved by Fauci,
“especially” supporting China’s COVID-19 response.

You can see how Judicial Watch is again stepping up to the plate to
investigate one of the biggest stories in our nation’s and the
world’s history.

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR DETAILS OUTSOURCING ASYLUM PROCESS IN
MEXICO TO UN, FOREIGN NGOS

Why is the Biden administration involving the United Nations in the
destruction of our borders?

We’d like to know, so we filed a FOIA lawsuit against the U.S.
Department of State for details on the Biden administration’s
outsourcing the U.S. asylum process in Mexico to the United Nations
(UN) and foreign non-governmental organizations (NGOs) (_Judicial
Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of State_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56616&L=25771&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtc3RhdGUtdW4tbWV4aWNvLWFzeWx1bS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDIzMDMvI19ibGFuaz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDkwNDAxMjAzMg==]
(No. 1:21-cv-02303)).

We sued on August 30, 2021, after the State Department failed to
respond to a May 12 FOIA request for:

All records regarding to the role of the office of the United Nations
High Commissioner for Refugees (UNHCR), the International Organization
for Migration (IOM), and/or any non-profit organization in the
processing of asylum seekers or other undocumented migrants in
northern Mexico seeking entry into the United States. This request
includes any related records of communication between any
representative of the Department of State and any representative of
the UNHCR and/or the IOM.

All records of communication between any representative of the
Department of State (including, but not limited to, the United States
Mission to the United Nations) and any representative of the United
Nations or any United Nations agency related to the allocation of U.S.
contributions to the UNHCR to nonprofit organizations providing
assistance to asylum seekers and other undocumented migrants in
northern Mexico.

In May 2021 Reuters reported
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56616&L=25772&F=T&]
that
the Biden administration had initiated a “new process task[ing] a
handful of non-profits working in Mexico with identifying and
referring” asylum seekers and that “a spokeswoman for the United
Nations High Commissioner for Refugees (UNHCR) said the United States
requested the agency channel U.S. funds to the non-profit groups
involved.”

On August 13, 2021, a federal judge ruled
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56616&L=25773&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9hZ28ubW8uZ292L2RvY3MvZGVmYXVsdC1zb3VyY2UvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvbXBwLnBkZj9zZnZyc249ZjI3MjJmYjVfMiNfYmxhbmsmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA5MDQwMTIwMzI=]
the
Biden administration must reinstate MPP, finding that the Department
of Health and Human Services was “arbitrary and capricious” in
rescinding the program. On August 24, the U.S. Supreme Court upheld
the lower court’s reinstatement order and denied
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56616&L=25774&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc3VwcmVtZWNvdXJ0Lmdvdi9vcmRlcnMvY291cnRvcmRlcnMvMDgyNDIxenJfMmQ5Zy5wZGYjX2JsYW5rP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwOTA0MDEyMDMy]
the
government’s request for a stay of that order.

The Biden administration funneled tax dollars through the United
Nations and non-profits as part of its unlawful open borders strategy.
The Biden administration should stop the stonewalling and follow the
law so the American people can follow their money.

In August, we announced a FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56616&L=25775&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctc3Vlcy1kaHMvI19ibGFuaz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDkwNDAxMjAzMg==]
against
the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) for information on
asylum-seekers and other aliens participating in the Migrant
Protection Protocols program (MPP) (“remain in Mexico” policy) who
have been charged with crimes after entering the United States.

In other actions provoked by the Biden administration border crisis,
we filed a FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56616&L=25776&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvaGhzLWNvdmlkLWlsbGVnYWwtaW1taWdyYXRpb24vI19ibGFuaz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDkwNDAxMjAzMg==]
against
HHS for COVID-19 technical guidance provided to the Office of Refugee
Resettlement relating to illegal aliens released by DHS and U.S.
Customs and Border Patrol in June.

On April 30, we filed a FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56616&L=25777&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvYmlkZW4tYm9yZGVyLWNyaXNpcy1jaGlsZHJlbi8jX2JsYW5rP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwOTA0MDEyMDMy]
against
HHS for records about assaults on and abuse of unaccompanied alien
children in its custody after it was disclosed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56616&L=25778&F=T&]
that
multiple facilities where children are being held are unsafe.

Stay tuned, as more lawsuits and documents are coming soon...

Until next week,

clean_body: Obamagate in Federal Court [INSIDE JW] Judicial Watch Goes to Federal Court To Battle for Key Document Used to Justify Obama Spying on Trump [==] We were in court this week arguing for the right of the people to know the extent of corruption in the FBI when it accused President Trump of conspiring with Russia. That fraudulent notion has long been discredited, but virtually all of those responsible have not been held to account or even exposed. U.S. District Court Judge Carl J. Nichols ordered [==] a hearing in our FOIA lawsuit involving the full declassification and release of the “electronic communication” (EC) that officially launched the counterintelligence investigation, termed “Crossfire Hurricane,” of President Trump’s 2016 presidential campaign. The hearing addressed our argument against the Department of Justice’s attempt to close the case and withhold a full, unredacted version of the EC. In May 2020 we obtained [==] a redacted version of the EC, which was written entirely by former FBI official Peter Strzok. We filed the September 2019 FOIA lawsuit [=] after the DOJ and FBI both failed to respond to identical July 11, 2019, FOIA requests, which asked for access to a single record: “The Electronic Communication that initiated the counterintelligence investigation of President Trump’s 2016 presidential campaign.” (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Justice [= (No. 1:19-cv-02743)) In its effort to close the case, the Biden DOJ argues that there is not significant public interest in the full contents of the EC that initiated the counterintelligence investigation of former President Trump’s campaign and Russian interference in the 2016 elections. We filed a motion [=] countering that, “Disclosure of the full EC advances the public’s right to know what the government did, who was involved, and why the investigation into Trump and Russian interference was necessary.” We cited two declarations from Kevin Brock, former assistant director of the Directorate of Intelligence and former principal deputy director of the National Counterterrorism Center (NCTC) for the FBI. Brock testified that it is not standard procedure to have an EC drafted, approved, and sent to and from the exact same agent and that this is a violation of FBI oversight protocols: In the EC document here, the “From” line indicates the EC – and authorization to begin an investigation as required under FBI policy – is from a part of the FBI’s Counterintelligence Division. The contact listed is Peter Strzok. The EC was drafted by Peter Strzok. The EC was approved by Peter Strzok. On the face of the document produced, it appears the EC that initiated a criminal FARA investigation of unidentified members of the Trump presidential campaign was created by Peter Strzok, approved by Peter Strzok, and sent from Peter Strzok to Peter Strzok. This is not usual procedure. FBI policy prohibits an agent from initiating and approving his or her own case. Such action violates FBI oversight protocols put in place to protect the American people from an FBI agent acting unilaterally. * In fact, the EC does not identify any individual by name as a target of the investigation. It does not articulate any factors that address the elements of FARA as required by routine FBI policy and procedure and the Attorney General Guidelines and, therefore, does not contain sufficient justification for initiating an investigation into USPERs [U.S. persons]. Based upon my experience, no reasonable and experienced FBI counterintelligence squad supervisor in the field would have approved the EC at issue here – as released – which opened the Crossfire Hurricane investigation. The unredacted information released in the EC document here offers no legitimate predication justifying the investigation of USPERs involved in a presidential campaign or subsequent FISA intercept of a U.S. citizen The corruption is real and we’re not going to let the DC establishment consign this shameful episode to the memory hole. We expect a court decision in a few months... JUDICIAL WATCH SUES HHS FOR DIRECTOR’S EMAILS ON CHINA AND COVID RESEARCH Our government’s medical bureaucrats seem determined to obscure their entanglement with China and coronavirus research before the pandemic struck. We’re equally determined to get to the bottom of it. We filed a FOIA lawsuit against the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) for all emails of National Institutes of Health Director Francis Collins related to gain of function research, hydroxychloroquine and the Wuhan Institute of Virology (Judicial Watch v U.S. Department of Health and Human Services [] (No. 1:21-cv-02302)). We sued after the National Institutes of Health failed to respond to our June 8, 2021, FOIA request for: All emails sent to and from Director Francis Collins related to “gain of function”, “hydroxychloroquine”, “HCQ”, and/or “Wuhan Institute of Virology.” When challenged about whether the National Institutes of Health supported gain of function research, Collins released a statement on May 19, 2021, claiming [== Based on outbreaks of coronaviruses caused by animal to human transmissions such as in Asia in 2003 that caused Severe Acute Respiratory Syndrome [=] (SARS), and in Saudi Arabia in 2012 that caused Middle East Respiratory Syndrome [] (MERS), NIH and the National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases (NIAID) have for many years supported grants to learn more about viruses lurking in bats and other mammals that have the potential to spill over to humans and cause widespread disease. However, neither NIH nor NIAID have ever approved any grant that would have supported ‘gain-of-function’ research on coronaviruses that would have increased their transmissibility or lethality for humans. An August 26, 2021, report [] by the Washington Post claims the NIH has been funding gain of function research for years. Gain of function [==.] research involves experimentation that aims to increase the transmissibility and/or virulence of pathogens. According to the report: In the United States, NIH Director Francis S. Collins and Anthony S. Fauci, director of the agency’s National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases, have led the federal funding and oversight of gain-of-function research. Eight years ago, Collins and Fauci helped put in place high-level reviews and other safeguards in response to concerns raised by Relman [David A. Relman, a Stanford University physician and microbiologist] and aides to President Barack Obama, who were alarmed by what they saw as insufficient scrutiny of the research with ferrets. The NIH leaders and the Department of Health and Human Services pledged to subject the work to increased transparency and vetting. This included forming a review group of federal officials — known informally as a “Ferrets Committee” — to vet proposed projects for safety and worthiness. However, Collins and Fauci in recent years have helped shape policy changes, directly and through their aides, that undercut the committee’s authority, according to federal documents, congressional testimony and interviews with dozens of present and former officials and science experts. * Since then, the experiments have continued to unfold amid secrecy, and HHS, which administers the review committee, has kept its work confidential: No agendas, meeting minutes or other records of its proceedings are public. Even the names of the federal officials assigned to serve on the committee, which has spanned the Obama, Trump and Biden administrations, are kept secret On Sunday, March 7, 2021, Collins argued [] to CBS News that hydroxychloroquine was a “bust:” “Basically it was a bust ... maybe it got in the way of trying other kinds of repurposed drugs. All the enthusiasm about hydroxychloroquine was basically dependent on anecdotal reports,” Collins said. “And that did leave everybody with kind of a sour taste in their mouths ... we had to get over that. I think we're over it now.” Bottom line: The NIH, our nation’s medical research agency, is in full cover-up mode about the COVID-19 controversies and politics. Where are the emails? Our “big dig” into this issue is well underway with respect to Dr. Fauci. On August 25, 2021, we made public 129 pages [] of records from HHS that included an “urgent for Dr. Fauci” email chain which cites ties between the Wuhan lab and the taxpayer-funded EcoHealth Alliance. The government emails also reported that the foundation of U.S. billionaire Bill Gates worked closely with the Chinese government to pave the way for Chinese-produced medications to be sold outside China and help “raise China’s voice of governance by placing representatives from China on important international counsels as high level commitment from China. In July, we obtained records [] from NIAID officials in connection with the Wuhan Institute of Virology revealing significant collaborations and funding that began in 2014. The records revealed that NIAID gave nine China-related grants to EcoHealth Alliance [=] to research coronavirus emergence in bats and was the NIH’s top issuer of grants to the Wuhan lab itself. Also in July, we uncovered [==] CDC records revealing that Facebook coordinated closely with the CDC to control the COVID narrative and “misinformation” and that over $3.5 million in free advertising has been given to the CDC by social media companies. In June, we announced that we had filed FOIA lawsuits [] against the Office of the Director of National Intelligence (ODNI) and the State Department for information on the Wuhan Institute of Virology and the origins of the SARS-CoV-2 virus. Also in June, we obtained records [] from HHS revealing that from 2014 to 2019, $826,277 was given to the Wuhan Institute of Virology for bat coronavirus research by the NIAID. In March, we publicly released [] emails and other records of Fauci and Dr. H. Clifford Lane [==] from HHS showing that NIH officials tailored confidentiality forms to China’s terms and that the WHO conducted an unreleased, “strictly confidential” COVID-19 epidemiological analysis in January 2020. Additionally, the emails reveal an independent journalist in China pointing out the inconsistent COVID numbers in China to NIH’s National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases’ Deputy Director for Clinical Research and Special Projects Lane. In October 2020, we uncovered emails [=] showing a WHO entity pushing for a press release, approved by Fauci, “especially” supporting China’s COVID-19 response. You can see how Judicial Watch is again stepping up to the plate to investigate one of the biggest stories in our nation’s and the world’s history. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR DETAILS OUTSOURCING ASYLUM PROCESS IN MEXICO TO UN, FOREIGN NGOS Why is the Biden administration involving the United Nations in the destruction of our borders? We’d like to know, so we filed a FOIA lawsuit against the U.S. Department of State for details on the Biden administration’s outsourcing the U.S. asylum process in Mexico to the United Nations (UN) and foreign non-governmental organizations (NGOs) (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of State [==] (No. 1:21-cv-02303)). We sued on August 30, 2021, after the State Department failed to respond to a May 12 FOIA request for: All records regarding to the role of the office of the United Nations High Commissioner for Refugees (UNHCR), the International Organization for Migration (IOM), and/or any non-profit organization in the processing of asylum seekers or other undocumented migrants in northern Mexico seeking entry into the United States. This request includes any related records of communication between any representative of the Department of State and any representative of the UNHCR and/or the IOM. All records of communication between any representative of the Department of State (including, but not limited to, the United States Mission to the United Nations) and any representative of the United Nations or any United Nations agency related to the allocation of U.S. contributions to the UNHCR to nonprofit organizations providing assistance to asylum seekers and other undocumented migrants in northern Mexico. In May 2021 Reuters reported [==] that the Biden administration had initiated a “new process task[ing] a handful of non-profits working in Mexico with identifying and referring” asylum seekers and that “a spokeswoman for the United Nations High Commissioner for Refugees (UNHCR) said the United States requested the agency channel U.S. funds to the non-profit groups involved.” On August 13, 2021, a federal judge ruled [=] the Biden administration must reinstate MPP, finding that the Department of Health and Human Services was “arbitrary and capricious” in rescinding the program. On August 24, the U.S. Supreme Court upheld the lower court’s reinstatement order and denied [] the government’s request for a stay of that order. The Biden administration funneled tax dollars through the United Nations and non-profits as part of its unlawful open borders strategy. The Biden administration should stop the stonewalling and follow the law so the American people can follow their money. In August, we announced a FOIA lawsuit [==] against the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) for information on asylum-seekers and other aliens participating in the Migrant Protection Protocols program (MPP) (“remain in Mexico” policy) who have been charged with crimes after entering the United States. In other actions provoked by the Biden administration border crisis, we filed a FOIA lawsuit [==] against HHS for COVID-19 technical guidance provided to the Office of Refugee Resettlement relating to illegal aliens released by DHS and U.S. Customs and Border Patrol in June. On April 30, we filed a FOIA lawsuit [] against HHS for records about assaults on and abuse of unaccompanied alien children in its custody after it was disclosed [] that multiple facilities where children are being held are unsafe. Stay tuned, as more lawsuits and documents are coming soon... Until next week, [Contribute] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [==] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2021, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210903-2490-header&t=1&akid=2490%2E2526796%2Eh1hupS)
With so much going on in the news, I know it can all feel so overwhelming.
I wanted to take a moment to share some reflections on how we can be showing our support right now and prepare for the fights ahead.
First, I want to be clear that the bill passed by the Texas state legislature banning abortions after six weeks, SB 8, is an attack on _everyone’s_ reproductive rights.
This is not just about women’s rights, it’s universal to all genders. Reproductive justice is connected to LGBTQ rights, racial justice, and economic justice — this law impacts _everyone_. If you drive someone to an abortion clinic, the state of Texas can sue you for $10,000.
This law was never about limiting the number of abortions. We know that making abortions illegal doesn’t stop abortions, it just makes them more dangerous and limits reproductive care to the wealthy and privileged. Abortion will remain functionally legal for some, while the most vulnerable will seek back alley abortions or use their savings to travel out of state.
Similar to the criminalization of drugs, the white and privileged can walk around with drugs in their pocket and never get stopped and frisked. Meanwhile, it’s a different story for low-income, Black, and Brown people.
If Republicans really wanted to drive down the numbers of people who need to seek abortions, they would support free and guaranteed health care for all and make it extremely easy to access birth control and reproductive care.
But the reason this is happening in Texas is very calculated. Texas is a huge state and it has been turning more and more blue. As elections are getting more competitive, this kind of attack is intentional.
Instead of changing their views as the state changes, Republicans are so beholden to an underlying logic of white supremacy, patriarchy, corruption, greed, corporate power, and lobbying that they have nowhere to go but to restrict voting rights, further gerrymander their districts, and control people’s bodies.
Our community of supporters has raised more than $185,000 so far to support Texas abortion funds. Here’s that link, if you’re able to pitch in and help patients access safe abortion care: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-abortion-funds-em](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-abortion-funds-em?refcode=em20210903-2490-P_FND_CHA_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2490_2526796_h1hupS&akid=2490%2E2526796%2Eh1hupS)
**But we need to keep it real, y’all: We have the ability to stop all of this right now.**
We have a Democratic majority in the House and Senate and a Democrat in the White House.
This isn’t just about blaming Republicans, Democrats need to step it up and fight harder. I will be the first to tell you that our party isn’t fighting hard enough.
**Democrats can either abolish the filibuster, get dark money out of politics, and expand voting rights** by passing HR 1, the _For the People Act_ , or do nothing as millions of peoples’ bodies, rights, and lives are sacrificed for far-right minority rule.
Our democracy will be flushed down the drain if people are further disenfranchised and as dark money continues to corrupt our politics and behold our lawmakers. We cannot allow this to happen anymore. Too much is at stake.
This shouldn’t be a difficult decision.
With resolve,
AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-abortion-funds-em?refcode=em20210903-2490-P_FND_CHA_LEG&t=3&refcode2=2490_2526796_h1hupS&akid=2490%2E2526796%2Eh1hupS)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20210903-2490-P_FND_CHA_LEG&t=4&akid=2490%2E2526796%2Eh1hupS)**

---|---|---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

I wanted to take a moment to share some reflections on how we can be showing our support right now and prepare for the fights ahead. First, I want to be clear that the bill passed by the Texas state legislature banning abortions after six weeks, SB 8, is an attack on everyone’s reproductive rights. This is not just about women’s rights, it’s universal to all genders. Reproductive justice is connected to LGBTQ rights, racial justice, and economic justice — this law impacts everyone. If you drive someone to an abortion clinic, the state of Texas can sue you for $10,000. This law was never about limiting the number of abortions. We know that making abortions illegal doesn’t stop abortions, it just makes them more dangerous and limits reproductive care to the wealthy and privileged. Abortion will remain functionally legal for some, while the most vulnerable will seek back alley abortions or use their savings to travel out of state. Similar to the criminalization of drugs, the white and privileged can walk around with drugs in their pocket and never get stopped and frisked. Meanwhile, it’s a different story for low-income, Black, and Brown people. If Republicans really wanted to drive down the numbers of people who need to seek abortions, they would support free and guaranteed health care for all and make it extremely easy to access birth control and reproductive care. But the reason this is happening in Texas is very calculated. Texas is a huge state and it has been turning more and more blue. As elections are getting more competitive, this kind of attack is intentional. Instead of changing their views as the state changes, Republicans are so beholden to an underlying logic of white supremacy, patriarchy, corruption, greed, corporate power, and lobbying that they have nowhere to go but to restrict voting rights, further gerrymander their districts, and control people’s bodies. Our community of supporters has raised more than $185,000 so far to support Texas abortion funds. Here’s that link, if you’re able to pitch in and help patients access safe abortion care: But we need to keep it real, y’all: We have the ability to stop all of this right now. We have a Democratic majority in the House and Senate and a Democrat in the White House. This isn’t just about blaming Republicans, Democrats need to step it up and fight harder. I will be the first to tell you that our party isn’t fighting hard enough. Democrats can either abolish the filibuster, get dark money out of politics, and expand voting rights by passing HR 1, the For the People Act , or do nothing as millions of peoples’ bodies, rights, and lives are sacrificed for far-right minority rule. Our democracy will be flushed down the drain if people are further disenfranchised and as dark money continues to corrupt our politics and behold our lawmakers. We cannot allow this to happen anymore. Too much is at stake. This shouldn’t be a difficult decision. With resolve, AOC | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com

* Consoling the families of the Marines who lost their lives

subject: Hey, Peter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
My race in Florida will be the most closely watched race in the entire country.
|
---
| | | | Peter,

My race in Florida will be the most closely watched race in the entire country. Here's a play-by-play of what is going on in the fight for the Senate and for Trump's Legacy:

**In just the past few months:**
* Fox News has said my race could be the most expensive ever.
* CNN continues to move my race up on their list of Top 10 seats most likely to flip.
* The DNC and DCCC outraised their Republican counterparts in July.
* My opponent raised $4.6 million in Quarter 2 while spending over $2.2 million in Facebook ads since the launch of her campaign.
* I am pacing to land short of my Quarter 3 goal and will be outraised again if we don't improve in September.

**In the last 24 hours since I last emailed you:**
* My liberal opponent has spent almost $20,000 more on ads.

**And by the time you have read this far into the email: **
* A Democrat has already donated $10 to flip the Senate and reverse everything we built under President Trump.

This is what we are up against, Peter. **[To hold our own against the Democrats, will you donate $10 of your own to fight back against the Left?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58256329:6BT1ak2SN:m:1:3253819041:6A486154D5FF88374C1E04DFD9789241:r "To hold our own

Virginia played a crucial role in firing Donald Trump in 2020, but make no mistake -- Glenn Youngkin is doing everything he can to bring Trumpism back.
He bought the Republican primary and now he says he’s willing to spend **$75 million of his own cash to buy the Governor’s office.**
No wonder _The Washington Post_ said, “Democrats will err if they take this race for granted.”
With reliable polls showing this race within the margin of error, it’s critical that we build the strongest grassroots team in the history of Virginia elections.
[**Will you chip in now to help us fight against Youngkin's extremist agenda?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35201913/304345887/1097049879?refcode=20210904.1_VNA_9T&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTI5YjZmZi03ZjBkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VyYYbBOzEOodoWe5q9-AqMfpF2C0YUHR-FpEvKu_Edo=)

clean_body: Glenn Youngkin has all the momentum right now. | | | = | | Derek, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight called it “the most competitive race of 2021.” NBC News says “this race won’t be a cakewalk for Democrats.” The Cook Political Report said Glenn Youngkin’s nomination should be “encouraging news for Republicans.” And,The Washington Posthas said Youngkin has a “surprisingly good chance” of winning the Governor’s office. Derek, expert after expert is making it perfectly clear: Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate has a real shot at becoming Virginia’s next Governor. And with Youngkin crushing Terry on the airwaves, his chances are getting better every day. = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Virginia played a crucial role in firing Donald Trump in 2020, but make no mistake -- Glenn Youngkin is doing everything he can to bring Trumpism back. He bought the Republican primary and now he says he’s willing to spend $75 million of his own cash to buy the Governor’s office. No wonder The Washington Post said, “Democrats will err if they take this race for granted.” With reliable polls showing this race within the margin of error, it’s critical that we build the strongest grassroots team in the history of Virginia elections. = We still have a chance, but the heat is on, and we need our grassroots team to step up now more than ever. Can we count on your support? \-- Team Terry = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click._ Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Thank you for joining our team, Derek. It’s hard to express how grateful I am that people like you have become so engaged in the struggle for the future of our country over the past few years. Together, we fought for the rule of law, our democracy, and our values. We put an end to the Trump presidency and proved that _right still matters, truth still matters, and decency still matters._ **But our work is far from over.** Now, we must press on with the hard work of repairing the damage Trump has done to our nation and its institutions – while defending against Republican attempts to propagate the Big Lie and undermine the right to vote. And we must move forward. In the words of President Biden, it’s time to build back better. Arriving at this moment would not have been possible without you. We have an opportunity to move the nation forward on universal healthcare, voting rights, climate change, gun reform, shared economic prosperity, defeating the pandemic – and defending our democracy. There are so many important priorities right now, and I want to know where you think I should focus my efforts over the next several months. [**Will you take a moment (just a moment) to tell me what you think I should prioritize in the new Congress? After all, Derek, you have taken up the struggle for the heart and soul of our democracy, and you should help set our agenda.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35202134/304346629/162814336?contactdata=%2BSvB6RPizAdCTeXy7qGY2J8V2RIX9XQ9W2r4Cl9TsFfPhK9N4Gkw5lRMTgP8LLjbJxq40%2BCX%2B762qei52S3hm2xypN9ZCuhp33J6e5ADiad8yuoxmDFDHel0oS8v%2F65dVhL2uLUlAFgh2OoJlAtzq25ctRLLFjzGL8bUhtPc%2BRM%3D&refcode=em-welcome-series-1&ms=em-welcome-series-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTJlZDI3My04MTBkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i4r1sO10MH2P7suxG49C8W2djvuJparJWOChr5hKfFI=&emci=e7f550c6-c3e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=4e2ed273-810d-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=33917617) | | [TAKE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35202135/304346630/162814336?contactdata=%2BSvB6RPizAdCTeXy7qGY2J8V2RIX9XQ9W2r4Cl9TsFfPhK9N4Gkw5lRMTgP8LLjbJxq40%2BCX%2B762qei52S3hm2xypN9ZCuhp33J6e5ADiad8yuoxmDFDHel0oS8v%2F65dVhL2uLUlAFgh2OoJlAtzq25ctRLLFjzGL8bUhtPc%2BRM%3D&refcode=em-welcome-series-1&ms=em-welcome-series-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTJlZDI3My04MTBkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i4r1sO10MH2P7suxG49C8W2djvuJparJWOChr5hKfFI=&emci=e7f550c6-c3e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=4e2ed273-810d-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=33917617)

Adam

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: No Prayer on 9/11?!
body:
Dear Peter, Liberal hypocrisy in Washington D.C. is at an all time high. Local D.C. Pastor, Reverend Pat Mahoney, wants to gather a prayer vigil on the lawn outside of the U.S. Capitol pray for peace and the protection of our country on the 20th anniversary of September 11th. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58256530:JmQi9k2bN:m:1:3253819041:D56B112854159C1DDC996C25121F7A34:r) **But unelected government bureaucrats and the U.S. Capitol Police Board****won 't let him.** And while Rev. Mahoney isn't allowed to exercise his God-given First Amendment right to pray for our nation... ...radical left-wing politicians and activists get a free pass to loudly and obnoxiously do whatever they want. That's why we're suing the U.S. Capitol Police Board for discriminately DENYING Rev. Mahoney's First Amendment right to peacefully assemble and exercise his faith. [**Will you help us take on the Capitol Police Board for its blatant attack on religious liberty?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58256530:JmQi9k2bN:m:1:3253819041:D56B112854159C1DDC996C25121F7A34:r) Let me explain... With the 20th Anniversary of September 11th right around the corner, Rev. Pat Mahoney filed a permit to gather a prayer vigil on the grounds of the U.S. Capitol. But there was one thing standing in his way... In order to hold the prayer vigil, the U.S. Capitol Police Board required Rev. Mahoney to obtain a permit. _ _ **A few days later, Rev. Mahoney learned that the Capitol Police Board DENIED his request.** When Rev. Mahoney asked why he wasn't allowed to pray outside of the Capitol - especially for something as important as the 20th Anniversary of 9/11 - the Capitol Police Board told him the area is "restricted" and that permit applications cannot be processed. But that just isn't true. Just recently, leftist Congresswoman Cori Bush and a handful of her left-wing activist friends slept on the Capitol steps for days in protesting one of their radical social justice policies--demanding an extension of the eviction moratorium. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58256530:JmQi9k2bN:m:1:3253819041:D56B112854159C1DDC996C25121F7A34:r) Another group recently got a permit to protest on the lawn outside the Capitol too. In other words, Rev. Mahoney wasn't denied because the area was actually "restricted" or closed. **He was denied the right to exercise his First Amendment freedoms because the U.S. Capitol Police Board thinks it has unfettered discretion to pick winners and losers with respect to constitutional rights.** [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit against the U.S. Capitol Police Board by sending a generous tax-deductible contribution of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58256530:JmQi9k2bN:m:1:3253819041:D56B112854159C1DDC996C25121F7A34:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm a leading constitutional rights attorney and the founder of the Center for American Liberty. You may have heard about the Center for American Liberty before. We're a nationwide network of patriotic, Constitution-loving attorneys who fight for individual liberty. And since 2019, we've successfully taken on "Big Tech," radical politicians, Antifa, and others who have tried to cancel our constitutionally guaranteed civil liberties for their own personal gain. **Now, we 're suing the U.S Capitol Police Board for denying Rev. Mahoney the right to gather and pray on this upcoming anniversary of September 11th. ** As a non-profit organization, the only way we can do that is with the generous financial support of patriotic Americans like you. [**That 's why I'm asking you to chip in $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty so we can fund this critical First Amendment lawsuit. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58256530:JmQi9k2bN:m:1:3253819041:D56B112854159C1DDC996C25121F7A34:r) This isn't the first time Nancy Pelosi and/or the U.S. Capitol Police Board censored Rev. Mahoney's prayers. Earlier this year, Nancy Pelosi denied Rev. Mahoney the right to pray for our nation lower western terrace of the U.S. Capitol on Good Friday. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58256530:JmQi9k2bN:m:1:3253819041:D56B112854159C1DDC996C25121F7A34:r) Earlier this year, Nancy Pelosi denied Rev. Mahoney the right to pray for our nation lower western terrace of the U.S. Capitol on Good Friday. **A nd just recently, the Capitol Police ARRESTED Rev. Mahoney within 10 minutes for peacefully expressing his pro-life beliefs on the steps of the U.S. Capitol--the same spot where Rep. Bush and her friends were allowed to protest with impunity for DAYS.** It's plain as day that this is a coordinated attempt to silence a pastor simply because certain Washington elites don't agree with his message. **Denying a pastor the fundamental right to pray for the victims and families of 9/11 is sickening enough ...** But the fact that they won't let Rev. Mahoney gather to pray while other non-religious activities can go on at the EXACT same location is a gross violation of the First Amendment. [**Can I count on you to support our lawsuit against the U.S. Capitol Police Board by sending a generous, tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58256530:JmQi9k2bN:m:1:3253819041:D56B112854159C1DDC996C25121F7A34:r) I look forward to hearing back from you right away. And thank you in advance for your kind support. Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58256530:JmQi9k2bN:m:1:3253819041:D56B112854159C1DDC996C25121F7A34:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58256530:JmQi9k2bN:m:1:3253819041:D56B112854159C1DDC996C25121F7A34:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58256530:JmQi9k2bN:m:1:3253819041:D56B112854159C1DDC996C25121F7A34:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58256531:JmQi9k2bN:m:1:3253819041:D56B112854159C1DDC996C25121F7A34:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

But there was one thing standing in his way... In order to hold the prayer vigil, the U.S. Capitol Police Board required Rev. Mahoney to obtain a permit. A few days later, Rev. Mahoney learned that the Capitol Police Board DENIED his request. When Rev. Mahoney asked why he wasn't allowed to pray outside of the Capitol - especially for something as important as the 20th Anniversary of 9/11 - the Capitol Police Board told him the area is "restricted" and that permit applications cannot be processed. But that just isn't true. Just recently, leftist Congresswoman Cori Bush and a handful of her left-wing activist friends slept on the Capitol steps for days in protesting one of their radical social justice policies--demanding an extension of the eviction moratorium. Another group recently got a permit to protest on the lawn outside the Capitol too. In other words, Rev. Mahoney wasn't denied because the area was actually "restricted" or closed. He was denied the right to exercise his First Amendment freedoms because the U.S. Capitol Police Board thinks it has unfettered discretion to pick winners and losers with respect to constitutional rights. My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm a leading constitutional rights attorney and the founder of the Center for American Liberty. You may have heard about the Center for American Liberty before. We're a nationwide network of patriotic, Constitution-loving attorneys who fight for individual liberty. And since 2019, we've successfully taken on "Big Tech," radical politicians, Antifa, and others who have tried to cancel our constitutionally guaranteed civil liberties for their own personal gain. Now, we 're suing the U.S Capitol Police Board for denying Rev. Mahoney the right to gather and pray on this upcoming anniversary of September 11th. As a non-profit organization, the only way we can do that is with the generous financial support of patriotic Americans like you. This isn't the first time Nancy Pelosi and/or the U.S. Capitol Police Board censored Rev. Mahoney's prayers. Earlier this year, Nancy Pelosi denied Rev. Mahoney the right to pray for our nation lower western terrace of the U.S. Capitol on Good Friday. Earlier this year, Nancy Pelosi denied Rev. Mahoney the right to pray for our nation lower western terrace of the U.S. Capitol on Good Friday. A nd just recently, the Capitol Police ARRESTED Rev. Mahoney within 10 minutes for peacefully expressing his pro-life beliefs on the steps of the U.S. Capitol--the same spot where Rep. Bush and her friends were allowed to protest with impunity for DAYS. It's plain as day that this is a coordinated attempt to silence a pastor simply because certain Washington elites don't agree with his message. Denying a pastor the fundamental right to pray for the victims and families of 9/11 is sickening enough ... But the fact that they won't let Rev. Mahoney gather to pray while other non-religious activities can go on at the EXACT same location is a gross violation of the First Amendment. I look forward to hearing back from you right away. And thank you in advance for your kind support. Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends. | One of the main reasons I decided to run for Congress was that I didn’t see enough people in power dealing with the issues facing my generation. That’s also why I decided to talk to CNN about my experience freezing my eggs.

When I talk to folks, it’s clear that many young women and prospective parents are considering this option. And yet, discussions of fertility are stigmatized, so that often people feel like there is only one way to have a family and that we have to make decisions about family planning alone. So I decided to have an open and honest conversation about making this decision for myself and what the process has been.

_**[I hope you’ll take the time to read my full story from Daniella Diaz at CNN here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35212175/304374148/1219397027?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2UwNjRjNi05MDBkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4WMk7rNZwTnkITZ_xL9pUHnf2NdoGveilAwMAAxnkQs=&emci=913c206d-e20c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=7ce064c6-900d-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=14239920)**_

Freezing my eggs was a significant personal decision and one that I did not make lightly. I am grateful to live in a time where I do not have to choose between having a family and having a career, as so many prospective parents before me had to do. As well as being a personal issue for millions of families across our country, fertility and family planning are also crucial policy issues. As a member of Congress, I am committed to making building a family accessible to everyone, regardless of what that family may look like.

There isn’t just one way to have a family, and I hope that by sharing my story, we can open up the conversation and correct misinformation about fertility and family planning. [_**I would appreciate if you would click here to read my full story:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35212195/304374152/1219397027?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2UwNjRjNi05MDBkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4WMk7rNZwTnkITZ_xL9pUHnf2NdoGveilAwMAAxnkQs=&emci=913c206d-e20c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=7ce064c6-900d-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=14239920)

| On Wednesday, Greater Georgia [launched](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_D2d2VDEhw6hH8BlYX3b6y-97Qi5-3T_9Yd4tk0NcQUUPDjp8PFjSYQeJpkZUJ0-O_3RlmE0HxQAg4WxbGvFXLgxQtvp9ZV6vO8DdQ11fZNg7f_hqWQGFOXQO23bh4JWG3ecdxcFWXcjcuZO4-PGaKyqarkOI-TZjLGqlDLFId9ni3wyNgqJRgtt28xOoH2vzJjjeGbShkhy0UzVdM_1KIf2N1EfiR2dloY5GF9KsJKIMFoy3IDCfY8D3SQpu7Bdq_7lqZs7xcA-xYRj2YztGA==&c=eBmq28HApCSrwwe2sohQ7j8qEVuVRDNGkfSmPhcZBMz_cCxixBgtxQ==&ch=kZAu5s8V6_O8yF_oRdYIPkvhWtEvHRFlXgtPxE-8ipA614-D9axfwg==) the Red Belt Blitz campaign to register and mobilize voters in North Metro Atlanta. This [grassroots campaign](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_D2d2VDEhw6hH8BlYX3b6y-97Qi5-3T_9Yd4tk0NcQUUPDjp8PFjSYQeJpkZUJ0-ute67BLFOQaC9MxJ6NEB8guMn7w6ID6ZgoHH2rR2pTqcnzAyJI-9W4SFBlMRBKfhBwXM72lznzeqRnnAvOc3Q7kefRbCX9XkLQylueaAxVP3jSviwjW6ASczU25y8dzrkGGMB9wBrlWBXSp4FSWW2lvzj8GgnqwI7uTS1r579KfRNjXdAO8TG3Jgi0JjSoLX0JKnkWGtS_22EIf5ZbYeLG3vkYF8wg8LxXf5PJiPOk8=&c=eBmq28HApCSrwwe2sohQ7j8qEVuVRDNGkfSmPhcZBMz_cCxixBgtxQ==&ch=kZAu5s8V6_O8yF_oRdYIPkvhWtEvHRFlXgtPxE-8ipA614-D9axfwg==) is a six-figure outreach and mobilization effort targeting five counties in the North Atlanta "Red Belt": Cherokee, Hall, Forsyth, Bartow, and Floyd. As part of the campaign, Greater Georgia will register new voters and reach disengaged and disenfranchised voters via door-knocking, text and direct mail, volunteer recruitment, digital advertising, and outreach events.
Overall, Greater Georgia will make nearly 100,000 voter contacts in the Red Belt to reach:

* 80,000 unregistered, conservative-leaning voters
* 30,000 inactive and disenfranchised right-leaning voters who feel that their votes do not matter - a significant portion of the 339,000 disenfranchised voters statewide who voted in November 2020 but didn't vote in January 2021.

Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_D2d2VDEhw6hH8BlYX3b6y-97Qi5-3T_9Yd4tk0NcQUUPDjp8PFjSYQeJpkZUJ0-K9IIvxtdGtFYQmxw6L6y0bFBX3FD_5uyEKWZJHBTdVl5MkaUHGTiOO5QJPDpYSraEgrOG8nsFGL5KQv_mXE31Ce3HNR5h2MdJIWqJOps_R4kxdQlhijFig==&c=eBmq28HApCSrwwe2sohQ7j8qEVuVRDNGkfSmPhcZBMz_cCxixBgtxQ==&ch=kZAu5s8V6_O8yF_oRdYIPkvhWtEvHRFlXgtPxE-8ipA614-D9axfwg==) or the image below to view the Cherokee County digital ad (similar versions will run in other counties):

| INTERNSHIP PROGRAM
Greater Georgia has officially launched an [internship program](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_D2d2VDEhw6hH8BlYX3b6y-97Qi5-3T_9Yd4tk0NcQUUPDjp8PFjSaWu8pi33V58OeBcGasvNc9SHsXHkdc0m3syhh5akt4Y3jSVmR7ysCoi7vtfxa3A0vCt3WY96Mc5AQLdinDYuZOW898jPmhy6c-rtoGGHUYVvflc22yfckQ=&c=eBmq28HApCSrwwe2sohQ7j8qEVuVRDNGkfSmPhcZBMz_cCxixBgtxQ==&ch=kZAu5s8V6_O8yF_oRdYIPkvhWtEvHRFlXgtPxE-8ipA614-D9axfwg==)! We are recruiting interns to assist with voter registration and engagement. This opportunity will be great to learn the ropes of political organizing, including how to get out the vote, how to engage with voters in a variety of communities, and more. Possible areas of compensation include class credit, milage reimbursement, and cash incentives based on goal-oriented progress.
If you or someone you know is interested, please contact Outreach Coordinator Terry Fye at terry@greatergeorgia.com with questions or to submit a completed application.
The full internship application can be found [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_D2d2VDEhw6hH8BlYX3b6y-97Qi5-3T_9Yd4tk0NcQUUPDjp8PFjSaWu8pi33V58vjeMQ0tb1M_JLpTY2jxlE6MCA7B2bz5abyrqnZnFfrB-Of-WMsnALuLdrYy-LbgQrw5rgoOA8V4HX4JKHusMxo-7b2CPKuFEIK25Vf7spx7McRcOqCGhzU7hHpyVfVXElf3x046Cbs-zVePpFCHbc7OxiYLK-_VQA1dfATbo-Xo=&c=eBmq28HApCSrwwe2sohQ7j8qEVuVRDNGkfSmPhcZBMz_cCxixBgtxQ==&ch=kZAu5s8V6_O8yF_oRdYIPkvhWtEvHRFlXgtPxE-8ipA614-D9axfwg==).

| Loeffler's voting group launches 'Red Belt Blitz' in north Georgia Sept. 1, 2021 - [Atlanta Journal-Constitution](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_D2d2VDEhw6hH8BlYX3b6y-97Qi5-3T_9Yd4tk0NcQUUPDjp8PFjSYQeJpkZUJ0-ute67BLFOQaC9MxJ6NEB8guMn7w6ID6ZgoHH2rR2pTqcnzAyJI-9W4SFBlMRBKfhBwXM72lznzeqRnnAvOc3Q7kefRbCX9XkLQylueaAxVP3jSviwjW6ASczU25y8dzrkGGMB9wBrlWBXSp4FSWW2lvzj8GgnqwI7uTS1r579KfRNjXdAO8TG3Jgi0JjSoLX0JKnkWGtS_22EIf5ZbYeLG3vkYF8wg8LxXf5PJiPOk8=&c=eBmq28HApCSrwwe2sohQ7j8qEVuVRDNGkfSmPhcZBMz_cCxixBgtxQ==&ch=kZAu5s8V6_O8yF_oRdYIPkvhWtEvHRFlXgtPxE-8ipA614-D9axfwg==)
"Former U.S. Sen. Kelly Loeffler's conservative voter mobilization group aims to capitalize on the surge of growth in Atlanta's northern exurbs and beyond with a new effort to register and energize residents in a five-county stretch.
"The [Greater Georgia group](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_D2d2VDEhw6hH8BlYX3b6y-97Qi5-3T_9Yd4tk0NcQUUPDjp8PFjSUpCnlgKof4c2XT4pxmXZiYBCBHBhjkLzV2zt6coFFVb2fiGuHaAOT1vZDPswSF9y_UStwPvntfuIMrv9DoQo9l2dP1Fjjrnduxlh-iisaOsX-SCqrcOf0m7j8IsmoAstAogpckOV18mxajsCYKzYSjTNk07slVRkdf2nCUNbRgZ0VO7qLzXmFkHFzaQzSvPhbZBMkdM0oBHt9bym0bMxcorrDAijVY_L12ALmpbp9fV2NN_Ni9cNE0LuaTArj1GSg==&c=eBmq28HApCSrwwe2sohQ7j8qEVuVRDNGkfSmPhcZBMz_cCxixBgtxQ==&ch=kZAu5s8V6_O8yF_oRdYIPkvhWtEvHRFlXgtPxE-8ipA614-D9axfwg==) kicked off a 'Red Belt Blitz' in Bartow, Cherokee, Floyd, Forsyth and Hall counties, a six-figure initiative that's part of broader goal to motivate 100,000 additional conservative voters ahead of the 2022 election.
"'It's an unprecedented effort we haven't had on our side,' said Loeffler. 'We've seen the left out-register us in the 2020 cycle. That's why it's important for us to put our resources and efforts toward this new voter registration effort' ..."
