clean_body: | | | | | | | | | == | On Wednesday, Greater Georgia == the Red Belt Blitz campaign to register and mobilize voters in North Metro Atlanta. This == is a six-figure outreach and mobilization effort targeting five counties in the North Atlanta "Red Belt": Cherokee, Hall, Forsyth, Bartow, and Floyd. As part of the campaign, Greater Georgia will register new voters and reach disengaged and disenfranchised voters via door-knocking, text and direct mail, volunteer recruitment, digital advertising, and outreach events. Overall, Greater Georgia will make nearly 100,000 voter contacts in the Red Belt to reach: 80,000 unregistered, conservative-leaning voters 30,000 inactive and disenfranchised right-leaning voters who feel that their votes do not matter - a significant portion of the 339,000 disenfranchised voters statewide who voted in November 2020 but didn't vote in January 2021. Click == or the image below to view the Cherokee County digital ad (similar versions will run in other counties): | == | This work is vital to defending conservative values, and it will only be possible through the hard work and support of strong, grassroots volunteers. We need your help! -- Click == or the button below to find out how you can join the fight for conservative values. | | | == | | | | UPDATES: | SPALDING/HENRY/BUTTS COUNTY VOLUNTEER TRAINING Greater Georgia held a volunteer training session hosted by the Spalding, Henry, and Butts County Republican Parties. Aug. 23, 2021 | == | == | == | == | | | | LOEFFLER SPEAKS TO THE GREENE COUNTY GOP Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler spoke about Greater Georgia's mission to members of the Greene County Republican Party. Aug. 31, 2021 | == | == | == | == | | | | INTERNSHIP PROGRAM Greater Georgia has officially launched an ==! We are recruiting interns to assist with voter registration and engagement. This opportunity will be great to learn the ropes of political organizing, including how to get out the vote, how to engage with voters in a variety of communities, and more. Possible areas of compensation include class credit, milage reimbursement, and cash incentives based on goal-oriented progress. If you or someone you know is interested, please contact Outreach Coordinator Terry Fye at terry@greatergeorgia.com with questions or to submit a completed application. The full internship application can be found ==. | | | == | | | | IN THE NEWS: | Loeffler's voting group launches 'Red Belt Blitz' in north Georgia Sept. 1, 2021 - == "Former U.S. Sen. Kelly Loeffler's conservative voter mobilization group aims to capitalize on the surge of growth in Atlanta's northern exurbs and beyond with a new effort to register and energize residents in a five-county stretch. "The == kicked off a 'Red Belt Blitz' in Bartow, Cherokee, Floyd, Forsyth and Hall counties, a six-figure initiative that's part of broader goal to motivate 100,000 additional conservative voters ahead of the 2022 election. "'It's an unprecedented effort we haven't had on our side,' said Loeffler. 'We've seen the left out-register us in the 2020 cycle. That's why it's important for us to put our resources and efforts toward this new voter registration effort' ..." Click == to read the full article. | | | | Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler Discusses the Red Belt Blitz, Greater Georgia in Three Radio Interviews Aug. 25-Sept. 2, 2021 | == | The Morning Xtra on 106.3 (Atlanta) Click == or the video to listen. "What happens typically after an election is we take the tent down and say, 'see you in two years.' We've got to make sure that we not only keep the tent up, but we grow it and invite everyone in -- The Red Belt Blitz is a five-county focus ... that comprises about 10% of the conservative vote. We're going to be targeting unregistered voters, disengaged voters, and disenfranchised voters, and that's about 100,000 potential new voters." | == | Martha Zoller on WDUN (Gainesville) Click == or the video to listen. "We have to take the country back, and it starts with voting. That's why I have a huge emphasis on voter registration. Greater Georgia's already registered thousands of voters ... There's literally hundreds of thousands of conservatives to be registered, and we're doing that work. That's the first step ... [and] we're fighting for election integrity." | == | Bill Edwards on WTKS (Savannah) Click == or the video to listen. "I've been spending the last six months ... making sure that we stay mobilized as conservatives ... I'm focused on making sure that our elections are fair and trusted and that we get our folks back out to vote ... we have to make sure that we're fighting for election integrity every single day - not just in an election year..." | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA: | == == == == == | == == == == | | | | NEWS TO WATCH: | == - Board member of Stacey Abrams' voter org said mail ballots are most vulnerable to fraud in 2007 interview == - California state Senate votes in favor of mailing ballots to registered voters ahead of every election == - Texas Legislature Passes Election Integrity Bill == - Georgia election officials seek court orders for absentee ballot study == - California Recall Madness: Police Arrest Man in Car with 300 Unopened Ballots, Gun, and Drugs == - George Soros' Donations To Fight Newsom Recall Hit $1 Million == - U.S. Supreme Court in 5-4 Decision Lets 6-Week Abortion Law Stand in Defiance of Roe v. name: Virginia Democrats
subject: Virginia is for reproductive justice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35214821/304383661/-793144256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzYyMWYwYy05NzBkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bYeiVh_qo-CInfWYBzYq8KfR7m4e-01JWVkX1-u37VQ=&emci=d9e09fc6-eb0c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=2c621f0c-970d-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=15759664)

| | We know this week hasn’t been easy. The Supreme Court’s decision to uphold Texas’ 6-week abortion ban has been weighing heavy on folks across the country. So, Derek, we just wanted to take a moment to reach out to do two things: First, we just want to reassure you that **we will never stop fighting to protect the reproductive rights of Virginians.** And second, we wanted to take a minute to uplift some great reproductive health care resources for folks across the commonwealth. [Planned Parenthood Advocates of Virginia](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35214829/304383668/1853846864?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzYyMWYwYy05NzBkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bYeiVh_qo-CInfWYBzYq8KfR7m4e-01JWVkX1-u37VQ=&emci=d9e09fc6-eb0c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=2c621f0c-970d-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=15759664) have been working tirelessly to protect and expand access to reproductive health care throughout the commonwealth. PPVA fights to ensure that individuals and families have the freedom, information, and ability to make their own informed reproductive choices. [Blue Ridge Abortion Fund](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35214830/304383672/1404089771?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzYyMWYwYy05NzBkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bYeiVh_qo-CInfWYBzYq8KfR7m4e-01JWVkX1-u37VQ=&emci=d9e09fc6-eb0c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=2c621f0c-970d-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=15759664), located in Charlottesville, has been serving folks who need help paying for abortion care since 1989. For over 30 years, they’ve been working hard to make access to reproductive health care a reality for folks across Virginia who face barriers to abortion care. The [Richmond Reproductive Freedom Project](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35214833/304383673/-934386269?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzYyMWYwYy05NzBkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bYeiVh_qo-CInfWYBzYq8KfR7m4e-01JWVkX1-u37VQ=&emci=d9e09fc6-eb0c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=2c621f0c-970d-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=15759664) provides practical and financial support for abortion services in Virginia and surrounding communities. They’ve been a resource to the community since 2003, engaging in grassroots advocacy for the full spectrum of reproductive rights. **The fight for reproductive justice is one that takes all of us** , working together and doing what we can to ensure Virginians _always_ have the right to safe, legal abortions and other critical forms of reproductive health care. Onward,
The Democratic Party of Virginia

name: MalcolmKenyatta.com
subject: (Sign the petition) Make Roe v. Wade the law of the land
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

People in Texas effectively lost the right to choose this week after the Supreme Court failed to protect Roe v. Wade.
It's been 48 years — it's time we put an end to Republicans' attacks on reproductive rights for good. Do you agree?
[If you believe it's time for Congress to codify Roe and make reproductive rights the law of the land, sign our petition and demand they act NOW >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35215393/304386860/-1246654252?refcode2=eaa87d24-990d-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210904-1-full&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWE4N2QyNC05OTBkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hLtfGYwv7qZ9B3lczC9CbodGkFfKLlsmysY--Jg-yQE=&emci=d6295c0b-f80c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=eaa87d24-990d-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=18034979)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35215394/304386862/-1246654252?refcode2=eaa87d24-990d-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210904-1-full&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWE4N2QyNC05OTBkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hLtfGYwv7qZ9B3lczC9CbodGkFfKLlsmysY--Jg-yQE=&emci=d6295c0b-f80c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=eaa87d24-990d-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=18034979)**
Listen, I know what it’s like to have that pit in your stomach when your basic rights are up for debate. We need more Senators who do as well.
I’ve watched my GOP colleagues in Harrisburg hold sham hearings and spread disinformation about abortion, but the truth is simple: abortion care is health care.
**If you agree, will you join me today in demanding that Congress pass legislation to protect reproductive rights for good?**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35215395/304386863/-1246654252?refcode2=eaa87d24-990d-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210904-1-full&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWE4N2QyNC05OTBkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hLtfGYwv7qZ9B3lczC9CbodGkFfKLlsmysY--Jg-yQE=&emci=d6295c0b-f80c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=eaa87d24-990d-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=18034979)**
Thanks for taking action today,
Malcolm

name: Heidi St. John for Congress
subject: Reminder: Heidi St. John Responds to Trump Endorsement
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---|---
|
Friends,

For the first 200 years of America's history, congressional races were about electing a qualified person who understood and could best represent the issues of a particular congressional district. In recent years, that has changed. In many races, the focus is on building a congressional coalition for either the liberal or conservative agenda.
President Trump is understandably focused on building that coalition and on payback for weak Republican representatives like Jamie Herrera-Beutler who voted for impeachment.

Unfortunately, Mar-a-Lago is about as far away from Washington's 3rd Congressional as you can get--nearly 2700 miles. The former President neither knows nor understands the issues that are important to 3rd district voters.
I do.
While both Joe Kent and I represent a dependable vote for the America-first agenda in Washington DC, I'm the only candidate who has lived in the district, worked in the district, and been a conservative activist in the district for nearly two decades. Joe is a johnny-come-lately who is deeply tied to the beltway and a former Portland resident where he was a registered democrat.
In March 2021, when I was brand-new to this race, I participated in a forum with Joe Kent. We were asked if we would support whoever Trump endorsed. We all said we would, in good faith--because we believed each of us could represent the area well.
It has been said, "You don't know what you don't know." There was much I did not know about Mr. Kent when I said I would support him if he got Trump's endorsement. Now I know better. Joe isn't who I thought he was. He isn't from here. He is an opportunist who has a history of bending the truth and members of his campaign have launched a dishonest, dirty campaign against me, full of fake news and outright lies.

People govern how they campaign.
Joe is not the person I want representing me, my children, my grandchildren or this district, and so, I am going to stay in the race. If we want to change the way things are done in Washington DC, we need to send true representatives to speak for us.
If elected, I believe that Joe will promptly return to his beltway friends and abandon his constituents, just like Jaime Hererra-Beutler. Voters have never had a more dramatic choice. I'm running to represent our district, AND I will be a powerful voice in defending our families against the progressive agenda that is dismantling this amazing country one piece of devastating legislation at a time.
Find out how you can join me in my fight for the soul of America at heidistjohnforcongress.com.
|

clean_body: He’s pulling ahead. | | | = | | Derek, Immediately after becoming the Republican nominee, Glenn Youngkin received Donald Trump’s endorsement to be Virginia’s next Governor. Now, things aren’t looking good for Virginia Democrats. Youngkin is using his vast wealth to self-fund his campaign (to the tune of $75 million) and the polls are tightening. Recent polling shows the race virtually tied! = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = With Trump’s endorsement, millions in the bank, and multiple polls showing a tied race, the last thing Terry needs is to falter this close to the start of early voting. We need to make sure we have the resources we need to run a winning campaign and build the field program we need to take on Glenn Youngkin. There’s no question that this is going to be incredibly close and we can’t take anything for granted. = | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = \-- Team Terry = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click._ Paid for by Terry for Virginia

body:
We talk a lot about the white supremacy and racism we see from Republican lawmakers in the U.S. Congress a lot, but this isn't just a problem on the federal level. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35217975/304397422/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFjY2YxZDg3LWExMGQtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DxChjQNIVyk5zPMtBb1z3nxVKaKc39Cf-yeqRz8hQKw=&emci=3cbced33-080c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=1ccf1d87-a10d-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=16335001) Team,

We talk a lot about the white supremacy and racism we see from Republican lawmakers in the U.S. Congress, but this isn't just a problem on the federal level.

Republicans in the Texas legislature just passed a new voter suppression bill -- S.B. 1. This bill bans drive-thru and overnight voting options, increases restrictions on mail-in voting, and more.

It's clear that this legislation will disproportionately harm communities of color, but during a discussion in the House, Texas House Speaker Dade Phelan attempted to ban the use of the word "racism" in the chamber.

**Texas Republicans don't want you to say it, but we will: S.B. 1 is racist.**

Republicans are changing the rules and excluding BIPOC voters from having their voices heard in our elections in order to hold on to power. That's racist, undemocratic, and just plain wrong. We need to fight back against this voter suppression bill right away.

**[Add your name to join us in the fight to protect voting rights for _all_ Americans >>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35217978/304397425/-139341769?gpsid=8_139_20342&ms=em21_210904_sb1_adv_gq_act__napac_ettx&refcode=em21_210904_sb1_adv_gq_act__napac_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210904_sb1_adv_gq_act__napac_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=napac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFjY2YxZDg3LWExMGQtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DxChjQNIVyk5zPMtBb1z3nxVKaKc39Cf-yeqRz8hQKw=&emci=3cbced33-080c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=1ccf1d87-a10d-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=16335001)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35217980/304397428/-139341769?gpsid=8_139_20342&ms=em21_210904_sb1_adv_gq_act__napac_ettx&refcode=em21_210904_sb1_adv_gq_act__napac_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210904_sb1_adv_gq_act__napac_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=napac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFjY2YxZDg3LWExMGQtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DxChjQNIVyk5zPMtBb1z3nxVKaKc39Cf-yeqRz8hQKw=&emci=3cbced33-080c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=1ccf1d87-a10d-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=16335001)

clean_body: We talk a lot about the white supremacy and racism we see from Republican lawmakers in the U.S. Congress a lot, but this isn't just a problem on the federal level. Team, We talk a lot about the white supremacy and racism we see from Republican lawmakers in the U.S. Congress, but this isn't just a problem on the federal level. Republicans in the Texas legislature just passed a new voter suppression bill -- S.B. 1. This bill bans drive-thru and overnight voting options, increases restrictions on mail-in voting, and more. It's clear that this legislation will disproportionately harm communities of color, but during a discussion in the House, Texas House Speaker Dade Phelan attempted to ban the use of the word "racism" in the chamber. Texas Republicans don't want you to say it, but we will: S.B. 1 is racist. Republicans are changing the rules and excluding BIPOC voters from having their voices heard in our elections in order to hold on to power. That's racist, undemocratic, and just plain wrong. We need to fight back against this voter suppression bill right away. | Thanks, Never Again PAC Never Again PAC is working to defend our democracy from the 147 Republican members of Congress who sought to overturn the results of a free and fair election. Help us hold them accountable by chipping in $5 or more today. = PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC Never Again PAC PO Box 2153 Purcellville, VA 20134 United States

name: Max Steiner
subject: My great uncle.
body:
LaMalfa is like a fox in the henhouse when it comes to managing our water resources. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35219055/304401315/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDk0ZTA3NC1hNDBkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0bzLC3LDkTNDsuTbBPbnteTMvd9kO7DeTA0g79Lme3c=)
Friend,

**According to _Cal Matters,_ 2,700 wells across California are projected to go dry this year. If that trend continues, another 1,000 will go dry next year.** Unfortunately, the impacts of the megadrought are being felt the hardest here in the North State, specifically in our congressional district:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35219056/304401316/1903956089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDk0ZTA3NC1hNDBkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0bzLC3LDkTNDsuTbBPbnteTMvd9kO7DeTA0g79Lme3c=&emci=1f94e074-a40d-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=2094e074-a40d-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=11663292)
Unless we take urgent and decisive action, we can expect this to be the new normal. We must acknowledge the impacts of a changing climate. The water is just not there.

My opponent, Doug LaMalfa claims to know how to manage our resources because his family has a long tradition of using water on the farm. That's like putting a fox in charge of the henhouse because it comes from a long line of foxes.

My family, going back to my great uncle Wesley Steiner, has a history of actually delivering on projects that expanded water resources. He got the job done despite the obstacles.

**We can work toward solutions to these issues and the megadrought, but it’s going to take nuanced policy-making and not falling into the trap of turning this into a fight between environmentalists and farmers.**

I'm ready to use my expertise to make tough decisions, and you have my word that I will go to bat for all members of our community.

**[I'm ready to bring my knowledge of water management to Washington to work toward real solutions for this district, but I need to know you're with me. clean_body: LaMalfa is like a fox in the henhouse when it comes to managing our water resources. | = Friend, According to Cal Matters, 2,700 wells across California are projected to go dry this year. If that trend continues, another 1,000 will go dry next year. Unfortunately, the impacts of the megadrought are being felt the hardest here in the North State, specifically in our congressional district: Unless we take urgent and decisive action, we can expect this to be the new normal. We must acknowledge the impacts of a changing climate. The water is just not there. My opponent, Doug LaMalfa claims to know how to manage our resources because his family has a long tradition of using water on the farm. That's like putting a fox in charge of the henhouse because it comes from a long line of foxes. My family, going back to my great uncle Wesley Steiner, has a history of actually delivering on projects that expanded water resources. He got the job done despite the obstacles. We can work toward solutions to these issues and the megadrought, but it’s going to take nuanced policy-making and not falling into the trap of turning this into a fight between environmentalists and farmers. I'm ready to use my expertise to make tough decisions, and you have my word that I will go to bat for all members of our community. | Thanks in advance, Max = | = Max Steiner is a combat veteran, foreign service officer, and Democrat running to flip California's 1st District from red to blue. name: Nikki Fried
subject: RE: Red Tide
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

Today is National Wildlife Day, and I want to take a moment to talk about Florida’s vulnerable environment.

This week, I met with environmental leaders in Tampa about the ongoing red tide crisis. We agreed on the need for swift and bold action to protect our environment, our fishermen, and our economy.

As Commissioner of Agriculture, I’ve made defending water quality a top priority, referring over 6,600 complaints to the Department of Environmental Protection.

But Ron DeSantis hasn’t done the same—instead, he’s ignored warning signs on every single environmental crisis we face.

Elected Republicans have failed to be proactive on these crises for decades. Now, we’re facing the consequences—and we need a Governor committed to bold action that will protect our state for generations to come.

I know it’s a long weekend, so I’ll try not to bother you again. But if you’re ready to join our fight to protect Florida’s environment, please click here to chip in now and help us defeat Ron DeSantis. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-enviro-sept]

Tackling climate change, addressing environmental threats, and promoting resiliency is about more than keeping our state beautiful. It’s key to our economic recovery, to the tourism industry, and to working people across Florida.

That’s why as Governor, I’ll never wait to act.

Thanks for fighting by my side on this.

Warmly,
Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/83760c8d-fd0c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed/767df707-ab0d-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjdkZjcwNy1hYjBkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YHXnWcqKHvp-pXAfzst0f4KkyqxcrzwUmHN7FLtADtQ=&id=116879433 .

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: can you take two minutes to complete our latest state of the race and issue survey?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Team -
Occasionally, we like to check in with some of Mark Kelly's top supporters to see how you think he's doing in the Senate, how the race is going, and what issues are important to you.
Today is that day.

Our objective here is to send out this survey from time to time, keeping the questions mostly the same in the hopes that we can track how responses evolve over time.
Hearing directly from those who support Mark the most, and even those who don’t, is extraordinarily helpful to our campaign.
So please:

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: The Trump family and members of Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=bhKtIQHhzll%2FF9ArcG2uJxHQ67uP004V&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
They are serious and we need them to be: The bipartisan select committee investigating the Jan. 6 insurrection has asked telecommunication companies to preserve records of members of Congress and the Trump family who participated in the "Stop the Steal" rally - otherwise known as the precursor to the attack on the Capitol.
**In other words, we are about to learn whether members of Congress and the Trump family aided the violent insurrectionists the day of the Capitol attack.**
According to CNN, the committee may investigate the communications of elected officials such as Reps. Lauren Boebert, Marjorie Taylor Greene, Matt Gaetz, and Jim Jordan. They will also reportedly investigate the former president and his children.
This comes just weeks after I heard closed-door testimony from former AG Jeff Rosen -- who offered chilling confirmation that Donald Trump mounted a brutal pressure campaign aimed at the Department of Justice, seeking to weaponize the DOJ to overturn the 2020 election.
Here's what I can tell you as a former U.S. Attorney and a state attorney general for over 20 years: Based on that testimony alone, there is real potential for criminal charges to be considered against the former president. All the facts must be gathered, and all options must be considered.
**But Republicans will do whatever they can to protect themselves and cover for Donald Trump and his family. They are already making threats to try to keep the facts from coming out. It 's up to all grassroots Democrats to speak out and ensure Trump is held accountable - which is why I need to know where 1,000 of you stand right now:**
**[Should criminal charges be considered for Donald Trump, his family, and members of Congress if proven that they aided the Jan. 6 insurrectionists?](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-trump-crimes?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1068-su-nd)**
It's becoming clearer and clearer that the former president and his acolytes mounted an unprecedented and coordinated attack on our democratic institutions. The damages they inflicted - and attempted to inflict - are some of the gravest in modern times. It's incumbent upon all of us to speak out. I appreciate you speaking out alongside me.
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ie0AQRXwdcGxcJtaPvI9FeZK%2BEbXeMA0&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

subject: Update from Mississippi Center for Public Policy
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/updatefrommcpp?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=961bffbc5a&e=5703353baa)
---
| | [](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=6773eebdf0&e=5703353baa)
---
| | [](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=94d4c959a6&e=5703353baa)
---
| Friend,
More people in Mississippi find that they are unable to access health care on the grounds of cost than almost any place else in America.

In order to make health care more affordable for more people, some have suggested that we need to simply spend more federal money. But hosing federal dollars at our health care system, without increasing the number of providers, would merely push up costs.

The key to affordable health care in our state is removing those restrictions known as Certificate of Need rules, which prevent new participants from coming into the market.

We have been leading the fight to make health care more affordable by removing Certificate of Need restrictions. Josiah Dalke looks at some of the unintended consequences of state intervention in health care in terms of dealing with Covid. You can read his article [here!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=24e0a9cfcf&e=5703353baa)

[Matthew Nicaud looks at what we can do to try to improve our state infrastructure, including roads.](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=fd0443c455&e=5703353baa) The key to being able to spend more on roads is to have a balanced state budget and get control of other costs.

The Supreme Court recently ruled against the President’s eviction moratorium. [Aaron Rice explains why this is so important. ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=bca5ef0d58&e=5703353baa)

Our Axe the Tax Campaign received a boost when Grover Norquist came to give evidence to the State Legislature last week. [Matthew Nicaud looks at how abolishing the state income tax could help attract more people to our state.](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=530df880db&e=5703353baa)

I hope you have a great Labor Day weekend!

---
| |
---
Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

---
| [**Ps. Here is my latest opinion column explaining why no one should NEVER BET AGAINST AMERICA. **](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=5e06347cfa&e=5703353baa)
[**After what happened in Afghanistan last week, we need to recognize that America’s enemies have been emboldened. But I explain how, if America remains true to the Founding Ideals, we will recover and it will be morning in America again ..... READ IT HERE**](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=d33c2db576&e=5703353baa)
---
|
---

name: Patrick Clark, Keystone Progress
subject: Appalachian Climate Infrastructure Plan: A better deal for those getting a raw deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=090321app [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=090321app]

Dear Friend,

In the coming weeks, Congress is going to vote on infrastructure funding—and the outcome is going to have a huge effect on the parts of our state that have been underserved over decades, and particularly hurt by the pandemic economy.

On September 9th, our partners with ReImagine Appalachia are holding an online event featuring some of the over 100 local elected officials that have stood up to move Congress & support climate infrastructure in our communities. Join us for a virtual press conference on Thursday, September 9th at Noon.
[https://secure.everyaction.com/RzaCSZwQe0igtl6M0ftyyw2?emci=c38b472e-6107-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=147f9e21-6807-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=6803615]

Their push—a comprehensive, climate infrastructure plan that will:

- Repair the damage from the last century: Plug orphan oil & gas wells, reclaim abandoned mine lands, repair dams & levees, and repair leaks in gas pipelines
- Modernize the electric grid: Upgrade the grid, e.g., with underground power lines, distributed generation, and utility-scale renewable energy
- Create universal broadband access: Bring fast, affordable, reliable broadband to rural areas & city neighborhoods.
- Grow clean, efficient manufacturing: Repurpose shuttered coal plants for energy efficient manufacturing; become a leader in sustainable production
- Build a more sustainable transportation system: Public transit expansion and upgrades, including rail; expand access to electric vehicles and EV charging stations
- Relaunch the Civilian Conservation Corps: Update 1930s CCC to restore forests & waterways, repair damaged lands, and create pathways to meaningful careers in the process

If Congress agrees to this plan, it would create over 523,000 jobs in the region.

We fully support this push—and hope that you’ll join the event. To register, click here.
[https://secure.everyaction.com/RzaCSZwQe0igtl6M0ftyyw2?emci=c38b472e-6107-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=147f9e21-6807-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=6803615]

Thank you,

Patrick Clark
Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees.

Keystone Progress Education Fund
PO Box 1206
Harrisburg, PA 17108
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.everyaction.com/unsubscribeUnique/74c80b5a-e00c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed/de8ed249-b20d-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRlOGVkMjQ5LWIyMGQtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SQ6VEZwXgrd_fkWYsPQrtwbdcMMvYQT_Cya4WxPfdQY=&id=111098838 .

On September 9th, our partners with ReImagine Appalachia are holding an online event featuring some of the over 100 local elected officials that have stood up to move Congress & support climate infrastructure in our communities. Join us for a virtual press conference on Thursday, September 9th at Noon. [] Their push—a comprehensive, climate infrastructure plan that will: - Repair the damage from the last century: Plug orphan oil & gas wells, reclaim abandoned mine lands, repair dams & levees, and repair leaks in gas pipelines - Modernize the electric grid: Upgrade the grid, e.g., with underground power lines, distributed generation, and utility-scale renewable energy - Create universal broadband access: Bring fast, affordable, reliable broadband to rural areas & city neighborhoods. - Grow clean, efficient manufacturing: Repurpose shuttered coal plants for energy efficient manufacturing; become a leader in sustainable production - Build a more sustainable transportation system: Public transit expansion and upgrades, including rail; expand access to electric vehicles and EV charging stations - Relaunch the Civilian Conservation Corps: Update 1930s CCC to restore forests & waterways, repair damaged lands, and create pathways to meaningful careers in the process If Congress agrees to this plan, it would create over 523,000 jobs in the region. We fully support this push—and hope that you’ll join the event. To register, click here. [] Thank you, Patrick Clark Keystone Progress [] Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees. Keystone Progress Education Fund PO Box 1206 Harrisburg, PA 17108 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Josh Harder
subject: attacks on voting rights

body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/vj4O-qDlvmwt3Eyj3DcNMGf8Q2luSsDOc6qPCFRIt5U=/2-Me2kFUDoEU1oNHbMrtp5vY9YUkOAJSY2QNknDntbo=) | Peter, I had the great privilege of serving alongside legendary civil rights activist John Lewis during his final years of Congress when he was working tirelessly to restore the Voting Rights Act. And two weeks ago I was proud to provide a critical vote in the House to pass H.R. 4, John Lewis' signature voting rights bill. The bill would restore the parts of the Voting Rights Act that were gutted by the Supreme Court and ensure racist voter suppression bills like the ones we see in Texas and Georgia never see the light of day again. **We need to get this bill on President Biden 's desk. [Can I count on you to sign this petition and demand the Senate take immediate action to protect voting rights?](https://act.myngp.com/el/vj4O-qDlvmwt3Eyj3DcNMGf8Q2luSsDOc6qPCFRIt5U=/2-Me2kFUDoEU1oNHbMrtp5vY9YUkOAJSY2QNknDntbo=)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://act.myngp.com/el/vj4O-qDlvmwt3Eyj3DcNMGf8Q2luSsDOc6qPCFRIt5U=/2-Me2kFUDoEU1oNHbMrtp5vY9YUkOAJSY2QNknDntbo=)
---
Voting is the foundation of our democracy. We have to make sure that everyone who has the right to vote, is able to exercise it. Josh and his Democratic colleagues in the House did their job, now we need the Senate to do theirs.
**The right to vote is sacred -- that's why passing the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act is so important. [Will you add your name right now to demand the Senate pass H.R. 4 to protect voting rights?](https://act.myngp.com/el/vj4O-qDlvmwt3Eyj3DcNMGf8Q2luSsDOc6qPCFRIt5U=/2-Me2kFUDoEU1oNHbMrtp5vY9YUkOAJSY2QNknDntbo=)**

name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: 6 years ago
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
As a soldier, I was trained to take out terrorist threats -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I am in the world. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4c6a1cb48a4a4b45a12ba93e89dc7bd9&_e=sJFUYCl4Gh5rjqaDrM7XAsnzge4PfXkL5lge_JEyn-L3ggXhxV4iIEbPc2TGwT5sWv4tSatKnfeF1v8n9fvd9NXGeZoH5hTbYI5B5ipza-1xjJuOC-lX2O4ANbzyuUoI5pSlQT3CCsKEl1HmseHenDIUe4jG9zNIUX80cPu7iKcsqXxG9Wpamew-gsnB_23a4iWEfp2CCAZo1mt1o0R4N6Owi7W3BlJpO4PixYgqb3afw954tHW39qKAiQxliNFNCYy5yfXTpTY8VwPOGD99GEmA2dQOEHIhiyfhB9xcjcsHvTwePwz2W8Ni9JCmZqZGrBFQo3854RDmtS4VP9u1Xw1pv2K2w0viM5IqAo-1Qcsd16QVQBAMw2DmykcUp6ct9t5GvjSjGx0ulnDMgqbOYoUYTJDriA3fsOsoOkCu6nlmDyB_NWDOjFoGoYN7Q_Cn0zlaSsJHFsIPs8OXiS_TXidLCxQ0fZsq79yQtqdpsdk%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative,

Like so many Americans, I am watching the scenes coming out of Afghanistan with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes...

**August 21 st marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever.**

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4c6a1cb48a4a4b45a12ba93e89dc7bd9&_e=sJFUYCl4Gh5rjqaDrM7XAsnzge4PfXkL5lge_JEyn-L3ggXhxV4iIEbPc2TGwT5sWv4tSatKnfeF1v8n9fvd9NXGeZoH5hTbYI5B5ipza-1xjJuOC-lX2O4ANbzyuUoI5pSlQT3CCsKEl1HmseHenDIUe4jG9zNIUX80cPu7iKcsqXxG9Wpamew-gsnB_23a4iWEfp2CCAZo1mt1o0R4N6Owi7W3BlJpO4PixYgqb3afw954tHW39qKAiQxliNFNCYy5yfXTpTY8VwPOGD99GBufhK_dvC8bKOf6HwAixP1gm0DQZBIyvFUFCQ0bCc8J7l4_UvGW0GBtiCBNjBgSSZdMtDE8kF2E0bYOTNWSLKOL6L5Iisy3HN8JIDpB0aO6X1cfguAxTsbg7845fjs83cWTIiu6OtLmJEsua0HW4XPFiLE0jVq0XLcp8_lpsdcEVQHlDXdOM3VFuyI6VmoTo0-1k5pA6J5QpGaH82HZz7M%3D)
I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all.

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. **Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist.**

This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Fellow Conservative - **I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values.**

[**At the end of this email, I am going to ask you to donate $6 to my campaign for Congress, in honor of the sixth anniversary of the Thalys train attack. But first, you need to understand why we need an American fighter like myself in Washington.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4c6a1cb48a4a4b45a12ba93e89dc7bd9&_e=sJFUYCl4Gh5rjqaDrM7XAsnzge4PfXkL5lge_JEyn-L3ggXhxV4iIEbPc2TGwT5sWv4tSatKnfeF1v8n9fvd9NXGeZoH5hTbYI5B5ipza-1xjJuOC-lX2O4ANbzyuUoI5pSlQT3CCsKEl1HmseHenDIUe4jG9zNIUX80cPu7iKcsqXxG9Wpamew-gsnB_23a4iWEfp2CCAZo1mt1o0R4N6Owi7W3BlJpO4PixYgqb3afw954tHW39qKAiQxliNFNCYy5yfXTpTY8VwPOGD99GONwa_Uevg3qTpFvvpw0-ekOJlFj6JvmXvKamuvXTED_gL8bd-gjTn3stfv6b2IAOXUqxrGS1rm3zhJtBx8d4GrqZ259-DYqqOP7uLnsQkpEcSqq-Eok7cC6K7iTB3RtntV-ANfrhlhmG0bGAMbyofIC_9pVWpSLxFQbOVJ1J2jbxyQN7cZ7pcCmGhQqO9eQm_ppTIkhM2YZHsl54hIU5Mk%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4c6a1cb48a4a4b45a12ba93e89dc7bd9&_e=sJFUYCl4Gh5rjqaDrM7XAsnzge4PfXkL5lge_JEyn-L3ggXhxV4iIEbPc2TGwT5sWv4tSatKnfeF1v8n9fvd9NXGeZoH5hTbYI5B5ipza-1xjJuOC-lX2O4ANbzyuUoI5pSlQT3CCsKEl1HmseHenDIUe4jG9zNIUX80cPu7iKcsqXxG9Wpamew-gsnB_23a4iWEfp2CCAZo1mt1o0R4N6Owi7W3BlJpO4PixYgqb3afw954tHW39qKAiQxliNFNCYy5yfXTpTY8VwPOGD99GCpLv0mbYrYNXmpm-UtbboRiY5F7SAyDpF44AiPcYV7hSIhXmVUIqh8EsXGvikrNfIkOUD9IlCSv-X2hHm_VfjLTkIq3lydUdny3uB8Fh0WzamWEBLHhsYQDG70Sg103cHCC1hZWG72XUAC4p1F8DVv-6o3dsRrq_GAxAoro6YPdBHOVlkmjHeDXWr7edO3keNpO0TxgocDy6ntw150ImRg%3D)
Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream.

Right now, Democrats are...
* Opening and destroying our borders. They are g**ranting dangerous amnesty** that will flood every corner of America.
* **Raising our taxes** like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable.
* **Defunding the police,** leading to a surge in violent crime
* **Erasing historical figures** from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln
* Teetering on the edge of a **dangerous foreign policy crisis**

These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. **They only care about their own radical agenda, and my opponent, Peter DeFazio is one of the primary offenders.**

The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. **We need a fighter in Congress, Fellow Conservative and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.**

My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. [**I am taking that mission and putting it into action by running for Congress, by fighting for my neighbors and their wellbeing in Washington.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4c6a1cb48a4a4b45a12ba93e89dc7bd9&_e=sJFUYCl4Gh5rjqaDrM7XAsnzge4PfXkL5lge_JEyn-L3ggXhxV4iIEbPc2TGwT5sWv4tSatKnfeF1v8n9fvd9NXGeZoH5hTbYI5B5ipza-1xjJuOC-lX2O4ANbzyuUoI5pSlQT3CCsKEl1HmseHenDIUe4jG9zNIUX80cPu7iKcsqXxG9Wpamew-gsnB_23a4iWEfp2CCAZo1mt1o0R4N6Owi7W3BlJpO4PixYgqb3afw954tHW39qKAiQxliNFNCYy5yfXTpTY8VwPOGD99GKFd5Vro3XkVfAnia9lBwSXc1OxTnxVMdEMtlkEJkqGFvXu7ds1EHlqb6cdoo2PbWJCoROhjABH7bcD-P5XND-aVYCUijnMVCPfbVSz1UF5B3_4UJ8NwpMi7S3zrDsbRDhHDSFc5LS5TgB0fuci5bbjCGwm30RL1f3Ze3GoaSllqETjD6DG7H3v1bM1KJJPuxMmCaYhzfuytbSTL3LzNO-U%3D)

clean_body: As a soldier, I was trained to take out terrorist threats -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I am in the world. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Fellow Conservative, Like so many Americans, I am watching the scenes coming out of Afghanistan with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes... August 21 st marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever. I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all. As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist. This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Fellow Conservative - I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values. Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream. Right now, Democrats are... Opening and destroying our borders. They are granting dangerous amnesty that will flood every corner of America. Raising our taxes like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable. Defunding the police, leading to a surge in violent crime Erasing historical figures from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln Teetering on the edge of a dangerous foreign policy crisis These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. They only care about their own radical agenda, and my opponent, Peter DeFazio is one of the primary offenders. The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. We need a fighter in Congress, Fellow Conservative and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.** My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. Thank you very much, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. body:
Help Terry McAuliffe defend Virginia’s progress.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35223126/304414394/-2023814932?refcode=20210904.3_TK_9V&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOThlZDI0OS1iMjBkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IbLdIm-IB44Q3U_t97DhVIrbjhEW5Y-O_SMiO5ldLrc=)

| | Derek, it’s hard to put into words just how important it is for Terry McAuliffe to win this November. His opponent Glenn Youngkin is a former private equity executive who said he’s willing to spend up to $75 million to buy the Governor’s office.

And what's more, Youngkin isn’t just endorsed by Donald Trump -- Glenn also says that Trump represents a lot of the reasons why he’s running.

**Derek, we can’t let Glenn Youngkin do to Virginia what Donald Trump did to our country.**

**[The best way for you to help is by pitching in right now. Please donate any amount that’s meaningful to you and help Terry defeat Youngkin.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35223127/304414395/-2023814932?refcode=20210904.3_TK_9V&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOThlZDI0OS1iMjBkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IbLdIm-IB44Q3U_t97DhVIrbjhEW5Y-O_SMiO5ldLrc=)**

Terry’s team is facing a huge monthly deadline. This one is big because Glenn Youngkin is neck-and-neck in the polls with Terry, and early voting starts soon. We have to show Youngkin we have the grassroots strength to keep up.

That’s why your support is so important. Election experts are calling Virginia one of the most important races in the country, and with Glenn Youngkin running neck-and-neck in the polls with Terry, it’s critical for us to come together so Terry doesn’t fall behind.

**[Please contribute anything you can afford right now and help Terry reach his goal. With your help, I know we can defeat Trumpism in Virginia.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35223128/304414396/-2023814932?refcode=20210904.3_TK_9V&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOThlZDI0OS1iMjBkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IbLdIm-IB44Q3U_t97DhVIrbjhEW5Y-O_SMiO5ldLrc=)**

Let’s send a clear message that Virginia is ready to fight for our positive and progressive future.

Thank you,

Tim | [DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35223129/304414397/-2023814932?refcode=20210904.3_TK_9V&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOThlZDI0OS1iMjBkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IbLdIm-IB44Q3U_t97DhVIrbjhEW5Y-O_SMiO5ldLrc=)

name: John Fetterman
subject: A hotdog is decidedly NOT a sandwich
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Hear me out:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210904-2524-header&t=1&akid=2524%2E434096%2EgY9eB7)
Peter,
[**_Today I am respectfully asking you to make a monthly recurring donation to our campaign of $5.19 — the price of a hotdog at Frankie’s in Pittsburgh._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29664?refcode=em20210904-2524&t=2&akid=2524%2E434096%2EgY9eB7)__
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29664?refcode=em20210904-2524&t=3&akid=2524%2E434096%2EgY9eB7)
_Ain't she pretty? A bargain for just $5.19._
Hear me out. When you commit to making a monthly donation to our campaign every month, it goes a long, long way. After all, we *really* depend on monthly donations to set our campaign budget each month and plan ahead for the long haul.
**In fact, setting up a monthly donation is the #1 best way to support our campaign right now** — despite the fact that it’s like buying just a single hotdog (which is decidedly NOT a sandwich) once every month!
**_[Can you make a monthly campaign contribution of at least $5.19, the price of a hotdog at Frankie’s in Pittsburgh? Making a monthly donation is easy and the *best* way to sustain our campaign during the primary and all the way through to the general election. All you have to do is click here.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29664?refcode=em20210904-2524&t=4&akid=2524%2E434096%2EgY9eB7)_**
**[Donate Monthly »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29664?refcode=em20210904-2524&t=5&akid=2524%2E434096%2EgY9eB7)**
Thank you for your support,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
BTW: I had to snap a picture of the absolutely outrageous hotdog with onion + mustard that I picked up at the Huntingdon County fair. I read an article the other day that said eating a hotdog takes 36 minutes off your life. I don’t think I buy that one, [** _but I DO know that donating $5.19 monthly to our campaign will be a huge help to our campaign right now. Can I count on you today, Peter?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29664?refcode=em20210904-2524&t=6&akid=2524%2E434096%2EgY9eB7)__
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29664?refcode=em20210904-2524&t=7&akid=2524%2E434096%2EgY9eB7)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210904-2524-footer&t=8&refcode2=2524_434096_gY9eB7&akid=2524%2E434096%2EgY9eB7)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

name: Judicial Watch

| | I know we’ve been sending a lot of emails lately, Derek, and I hope you’ll let me explain why. Glenn Youngkin has earmarked $75 million from his personal fortune to bankroll his campaign. _AND_ the Republican National Committee have announced they’re pouring millions into Virginia to help Glenn build a massive voter turnout operation. Look, we don’t have those endless resources. We don’t have a $75 million rainy day slush fund that we can tap into if things start looking bad -- believe me, I wish we did, especially this close to the election! Instead, we rely on tens of thousands of grassroots donors just like you. Thanks to you, we’re building the largest grassroots donor campaign Virginia has ever seen. And it’s giving us a real chance to win. That’s why we email you so much, Derek. Every time we send an email, hundreds chip-in anything they can to do their part. Look, I know it’s a lot, and with early voting starting in less than two weeks, we’re going to have to ask a whole lot more -- but believe me, having Donald Trump’s handpicked guy as our Governor would be far, far worse. [We can’t do this without you. Today, I’m humbly asking you to chip in $15 or $25 to the Democratic Party of Virginia so we can build the voter turnout program we need to win. clean_body: Please hear me out | | | I know we’ve been sending a lot of emails lately, Derek, and I hope you’ll let me explain why. Glenn Youngkin has earmarked $75 million from his personal fortune to bankroll his campaign. AND the Republican National Committee have announced they’re pouring millions into Virginia to help Glenn build a massive voter turnout operation. Look, we don’t have those endless resources. We don’t have a $75 million rainy day slush fund that we can tap into if things start looking bad -- believe me, I wish we did, especially this close to the election! Instead, we rely on tens of thousands of grassroots donors just like you. Thanks to you, we’re building the largest grassroots donor campaign Virginia has ever seen. And it’s giving us a real chance to win. That’s why we email you so much, Derek. Every time we send an email, hundreds chip-in anything they can to do their part. Look, I know it’s a lot, and with early voting starting in less than two weeks, we’re going to have to ask a whole lot more -- but believe me, having Donald Trump’s handpicked guy as our Governor would be far, far worse. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = Thanks for hearing me out — I hope this gave you a little more insight into our strategy and why it’s so important. With gratitude, Terry = = | | Click here to . | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Team Ryan
subject: MomenTIM: August 2021
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ][IMG]

Hi there!

Welcome to the very first edition of MomenTIM — a monthly newsletter for
our top supporters. Thank you for being such a big part of our team to
flip Ohio’s open Senate seat blue. Keep reading for recent updates:

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

ICYMI

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2430?t=1007&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]Republican Ohio Candidates Bash Infrastructure Bill Championed by the
Senator They Want to Succeed, Rob Portman: The bipartisan infrastructure
bill will bring billions of dollars and thousands of good jobs to our
state. So why does every single one of Tim’s GOP opponents oppose it? 🤡 🤡
🤡

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2431?t=1008&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]Senate Candidate Tim Ryan Talks Education in Amherst

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2432?t=1009&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]Tim Ryan Visits Trotwood Businesses, Gem City Market to Discuss
Businesses

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2433?t=1010&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]Ryan Visits Tank Plant After Securing New Funding

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2434?t=1011&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]Congressman Tim Ryan Visits Athens as Part of Workers First Tour

SHOT: [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2435?t=1012&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]New financial disclosures found that three of Tim’s GOP opponents
are multi-millionaires. Yep, one even has a house in the Bahamas and a
private yacht.

CHASER: Tim is still paying off his family’s house mortgage and student
loans. Tim will always put working people first because he’s one of us!
Meanwhile, his GOP opponents only care about keeping power in the hands of
their wealthy friends.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2447?t=1013&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]The Plains Dealer: Ohio Senate Candidates: Millionaires' Row... and Tim Ryan

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

CLIPS

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2436?t=1014&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]Your News Now: Congressman meets with union workers

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2437?t=1015&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]ABC22: Tim Ryan in Trotwood

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2438?t=1016&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]NBC24: Congressman Ryan stops in Toledo

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2439?t=1017&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]Channel 2: Senate Candidate Tim Ryan

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2440?t=1018&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]WTAP: Tim Ryan campaigns for Senate in Athens

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

FROM THE ROAD

GEM CITY MARKET: Tim visited Gem City Market, a grocery co-op founded to
bring healthy, affordable food to West Dayton. Tim is committed to
reinvesting into communities like West Dayton that have been underserved
and overlooked, so that workers in every zip code across Ohio can compete
and thrive.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2447?t=1019&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]Tim at Gem City Market

TROTWOOD: Tim met with local leaders in Trotwood to hear about how the
city has worked with businesses to create more opportunities for workers,
take on the challenges of today, and be prepared to dominate the
industries of the future.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2447?t=1020&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]Tim at Trotwood

BEEP BEEP: In early August, we went to Toledo for Jeep Fest! Traditions
like this are proof positive that Ohio has always been at the forefront of
manufacturing in this country. And Tim will fight like hell to keep it
that way.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2447?t=1021&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]DTim at Toledo Jeep Fest

TOUCHDOWN: There’s nothing more American than football. In Ada, Wilson is
manufacturing leather goods for our favorite pastime. We won’t need a Hail
Mary to bring back manufacturing jobs if we invest in businesses that do
right by workers and keep jobs in our state now.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2447?t=1022&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]Tim at Wilson factory

BACK TO SCHOOL: As the husband of a first grade teacher, Tim’s seen up
close how critical it is that we reinvest in our schools and give our kids
and teachers the tools to succeed. Thanks to State Representative Joe
Miller and the educators who joined Tim and his wife, Andrea, for a great
conversation in Lorain County.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2447?t=1023&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]Tim in Lorain County

Head Start programs like the one at Step Forward provide essential care
for working families while giving our kids the foundation they need to
succeed. Tim is working to give organizations like this one a leg-up by
investing in childcare and expanding universal pre-K.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2447?t=1024&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]Tim's son Brady at Step Forward

THIS IS ELECTRIC: Peak Electric in Toledo is lighting up Ohio from corner
to corner. Minority-owned businesses like this one stand to win big from
the infrastructure bill Tim is working to pass, which will help them hire
more workers as we rebuild and revitalize our communities.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2447?t=1025&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]Tim at Peak Electric

OHIO JOBS FOR OHIO WORKERS: No matter the terms or conditions, Tim will
always show up for Ohio workers. That’s why he was proud to join workers
at the Lima Refinery in their fight to keep jobs in the community they’ve
powered for generations.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2447?t=1026&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]Tim giving a speech at the Lima Refinery

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2447?t=1027&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]Tim withe Lima Refinery workers

Thank you Lorain County Dems and Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur for having us!

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2441?t=1028&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]Tim and Rep. Marcy Kaptur

It’s always great to catch up with House Minority Leader Emilia Sykes.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2447?t=1029&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]Tim and House Minority Leader Emilia Sykes

And thank you to everyone who joined our very first campaign listening
event, where Tim heard from hundreds of Ohioans across the state on what
it’s going to take to win this race and cut workers in on the deal.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2447?t=1030&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]Tim on listening event Zoom

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

ENDORSEMENT ALERT

Representative Joyce Beatty of Ohio’s 3rd Congressional District and Chair
of the Congressional Black Caucus doesn’t just know what's at stake in the
fight for working families, she’s led the fight. Tim is honored to have
her endorsement and so excited to keep working together to cut workers in
on the deal.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2447?t=1031&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]Rep Joyce Beatty endorses Tim Ryan for Senate

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

MERCH ALERT

Are you fired up to flip Ohio blue? Ready to cut workers in on the deal?
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/182?t=1032&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]Grab some gear to show your friends and family that you’re on Team
Ryan!

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/182?t=1033&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]Tim Ryan merch

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HELP US SPREAD OUR MESSAGE

If you want to stay up to date on our campaign and help us spread our
message to every corner of Ohio, make sure you’re following us on
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/99?t=1034&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]Facebook, [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11?t=1035&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]Twitter, and [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2443?t=1036&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]Instagram. Here are some recent posts
you can help us uplift:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2444?t=1037&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]Tim's Facebook post

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2445?t=1038&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]Tim's tweet

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2446?t=1039&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]Tim's tweet

Thanks for all you do,

Team Ryan

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2447?t=1040&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]Donate

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1003&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/1774?t=1004&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]Donate Monthly
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/49?t=1005&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ]Donate Once

Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
Tim Ryan for Ohio
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
United States
[ mailto:info@timforoh.com ][IMG] [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11?t=1006&akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn ][IMG]

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.timforoh.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=755%2E3611125%2Ey1RqXn

I'll never forget what it felt like to play for the Georgia Bulldogs on the historic Dooley Field at Sanford Stadium, in front of 90,000 screaming fan |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b7494b43fa32464099f347ecfcaced87&_e=rtRlawnv502zxiLoYMrSCXML94L_xnGcbuCQtu-HD4vJeqhON8qLA2ppFDytNcgCONyG3P_QAnUJ7Iyse3j8tTz9Uknc4bV0Q-hlgkXaEmal6zbjQlcKCIcVkmbjHY3C94-qlrFFeQhaa5Op-H_oLqklrDGL5nVGM6vVTtL7bUvRulujos1xVxJqG7d1xfZO_Y8JKkfZLck-Hvy-ERXvUiMBH60NuJiK5rgRLJ7XpZcAo8gElgindPtE06Csp0Q9braphXbwjPXeALZBqHt9iLF7t2mRNFXPgKE244j9qaeMjV9VQeZx7UN_iL4OI3kz6KmkDGbNM_0xG4lHxTIjmtiA92W-IBRxTgsk4WnxIK6cHrdhclSM2xxANiYDyGWQG8nPpwo6IQFykkQE2JZXiTSunnSxslzgAzW7S21R28bh3fzworwBqZisAJ5QEol77h-_KpJn869YR1SnSYM7qon-U8iHNaTArhO7H5dn1-Q37RNx_PlCc12CcZbUVv5p)

Peter,

Saturdays during football season are special in college towns across the country. _However, there is nothing quite like Saturdays in Athens, Georgia, when the Bulldogs are playing - especially being a Bulldog on a Saturday night after a Georgia win. _

From the electric atmosphere on campus to the roar after every play - amplified by over 90,000 fans inside of the historic Sanford Stadium - I'd be lying, Peter, if I told you I didn't miss it.

I've always felt fortunate to have had the opportunity to play for the Bulldogs. It was an opportunity I worked hard for and NEVER took for granted.

My time with the Bulldogs included a national championship and a Heisman Trophy, and it finished with my jersey number "34" being retired. **It was a TREMENDOUS HONOR, and I owe my success to my teammates and the support I received during my time in Athens.**

**[I'm reaching out to you today because I'm humbly asking for that same support again.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b7494b43fa32464099f347ecfcaced87&_e=rtRlawnv502zxiLoYMrSCXML94L_xnGcbuCQtu-HD4vJeqhON8qLA2ppFDytNcgCONyG3P_QAnUJ7Iyse3j8tTz9Uknc4bV0Q-hlgkXaEmal6zbjQlcKCIcVkmbjHY3C94-qlrFFeQhaa5Op-H_oLqklrDGL5nVGM6vVTtL7bUvRulujos1xVxJqG7d1xfZO_Y8JKkfZLck-Hvy-ERXvUiMBH60NuJiK5rgRLJ7XpZcAo8gElgindPtE06Csp0Q9braphXbwjPXeALZBqHt9iMTHpPR6uFZ9gixCk2U530fUdZq8DtYCh8RoJ_vljDfWqsUFv5DysN5tyPrbN988FK0Gzlx1glzn8SO24UzRNJh3zrv2_EH4_se_c2n3aNZ9xBlRbBu3ON-GbVjRHJH9IYokUQpUPvSKNGUb0PXzGnSVOUviE5pY3_9Ele_OnOxYc964l2XNaW0hWrgXxLeHDzMoMLpJdEQwqqf8GUIBiYl00C-DPQuotXbBn6GubUSI) **

As you may know by now, I've switched playing fields and have jumped into the political arena. **[Peter, I'm running for U.S. Senate in Georgia, and I'm asking for your support by making a contribution to my campaign of $5, $10, or even my favorite number- $34. Whatever you and your family can afford today will be deeply appreciated and greatly received.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b7494b43fa32464099f347ecfcaced87&_e=rtRlawnv502zxiLoYMrSCXML94L_xnGcbuCQtu-HD4vJeqhON8qLA2ppFDytNcgCONyG3P_QAnUJ7Iyse3j8tTz9Uknc4bV0Q-hlgkXaEmal6zbjQlcKCIcVkmbjHY3C94-qlrFFeQhaa5Op-H_oLqklrDGL5nVGM6vVTtL7bUvRulujos1xVxJqG7d1xfZO_Y8JKkfZLck-Hvy-ERXvUiMBH60NuJiK5rgRLJ7XpZcAo8gElgindPtE06Csp0Q9braphXbwjPXeALZBqHt9iK7eo03XYt6LdOSWLGkMsjiFrW_BzZdZtdOGKhSkG9XlWH6IGqSIa6a9WnePtWSy2hNnnkrop3BeeCRyqutJce4BBr2j_MOpe9zeajJzHwP5VdJhFHTii0OcR-P1NfuyR5PJX7iMbCZrakwwbLN3olFJqDWBz4rN5iwYm7beAaEv4Y9O-G-oUKV03EpvSvZmGrLA3PNDCUxgR5qiwXfbvsFwJsP6RgxfJQEIXBw9Mogd)**

Hearing tens of thousands of people singing Georgia's fight song - "Glory, Glory" - gave me the chills during my plays.

Peter, my fight for the people of Georgia lives on.

My campaign to help Republicans WIN BACK the majority in the U.S. Senate is about making government smaller, personal responsibility, supporting our military, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity for the American Dream.

My Democrat opponent has taken the exact opposite approach. He has proven he WON'T be the voice of Georgians in the Senate and has instead aligned himself with career politicians who put their self-interests ahead of the people.

It was a team effort for us to reach our goals during my football career at Georgia, and I'm asking for that same team effort today. Please support our campaign and help us WIN THIS RACE and WIN BACK the Senate majority.

**[Every little bit helps. Even a couple of yards at a time achieves a first down, so $5, $10 or $34 today will give our campaign the boost it needs to WIN.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b7494b43fa32464099f347ecfcaced87&_e=rtRlawnv502zxiLoYMrSCXML94L_xnGcbuCQtu-HD4vJeqhON8qLA2ppFDytNcgCONyG3P_QAnUJ7Iyse3j8tTz9Uknc4bV0Q-hlgkXaEmal6zbjQlcKCIcVkmbjHY3C94-qlrFFeQhaa5Op-H_oLqklrDGL5nVGM6vVTtL7bUvRulujos1xVxJqG7d1xfZO_Y8JKkfZLck-Hvy-ERXvUiMBH60NuJiK5rgRLJ7XpZcAo8gElgindPtE06Csp0Q9braphXbwjPXeALZBqHt9iF5v3ki6qhAXVozVoPr4LnTO4bOQlFXZkrZvBgydZcl_d4ICYL9xjyaKay_0Od1JQGE7zJe70fiJSucqa2jc8XUMS5whJu9dY27FTZtpUS2KnKXQ6kcDlcLlzL6cUunnnhSl0nzV8SpnDG00mHT4xz6WyXQI7sp_625UzNMgI_AgA5Q1HCqDrmLx3lf7ih8_BTLyG8yW5TcH0esZlmcfEdw96iA2s9ALv_N8qmMqGzly)**

clean_body: | | | | | Folks, my team just informed me of some pretty big news. Thanks to you and so many other supporters, we were able to catch up and hit our August fundraising goal! Time and time again, you’ve helped our campaign show skeptics that we have some of the best grassroots supporters in the country. This matters because, to put it plainly, this race is going to be close and I’m going to need your continued support. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Look, I have an idea of what you’re thinking. We just hit a huge goal, why do we need to raise more money? My answer is pretty simple — we cannot take anything for granted. As a refresher, our campaign won in 2018 by just a little over 4 points. I have no doubt that Republicans are drooling over the thought of their bigwig donors funneling money into Nevada to make up the difference in 2022. But, we have what they don’t have:people power. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for always being there to support my campaign. Steve | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for by Steve Sisolak for Governor Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: [Sign on]: Cancel Trump’s Line 3 Pipeline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Trump’s Line 3 pipeline would pump 750,000 barrels of oil from Canada to Wisconsin every day.
#
I’m proud to be leading this urgent effort, Peter.
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/cancel_line_3/?source=em20210904-603&t=1&akid=603%2E420207%2EmFDspt)
Right now, the dangerous Line 3 Oil Pipeline is part of Donald Trump’s lasting impact on our environment and public lands. But it doesn’t have to be that way.
Alongside my colleagues including Bernie Sanders and Jeff Merkley, I recently urged President Biden to stop this oil pipeline. For the sake of addressing climate change and protecting local indigenous lands and water, President Biden must stop this expansion of fossil fuel infrastructure.
**[Will you add your name to our call to stop Trump’s Line 3 pipeline? If we don’t stop it now, Line 3 could start pumping 750,000 barrels of oil from Canada to Wisconsin — through tribal lands — later this month.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/cancel_line_3/?source=em20210904-603&t=2&akid=603%2E420207%2EmFDspt)**
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/cancel_line_3/?source=em20210904-603&t=3&akid=603%2E420207%2EmFDspt)**
Here’s the thing: We are simply asking President Biden to keep his promise to protect the environment and fight climate change. Pumping more fossil fuels through more pipelines is NOT part of an environmentally sound policy. And the Biden administration cannot continue the assault on indigenous lands that Trump perpetrated.
**Local indigenous tribes have outright opposed this oil pipeline.** It would destroy their land, food sources, and water. Not only were they not consulted, many local indigenous activists have actively protested the pipeline — facing assaults and arrests at the hands of police.
**The impacts of this pipeline on climate change will be devastating.** We cannot be building more fossil fuel infrastructure as the climate crisis becomes more and more irreversible. Climate change has been declared a “code red” for humanity by international experts. There’s just no reason we should be supporting more oil infrastructure right now.
**[Can you add your name as a citizen co-signer of our letter demanding an end to this pipeline? Together, we can show the power of our movement to protect indigenous lands and avert further climate disasters.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/cancel_line_3/?source=em20210904-603&t=4&akid=603%2E420207%2EmFDspt) _Donald Trump approved it, now we need to stop it._**
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/cancel_line_3/?source=em20210904-603&t=5&akid=603%2E420207%2EmFDspt)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210904-603-footer&t=6&refcode2=603_420207_mFDspt&akid=603%2E420207%2EmFDspt)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=7&akid=603%2E420207%2EmFDspt)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=603%2E420207%2EmFDspt)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress
