name: Herschel Walker
subject: It’s Saturday in Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I'll never forget what it felt like to play for the Georgia Bulldogs on the historic Dooley Field at Sanford Stadium, in front of 90,000 screaming fan |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9c54633048e34810ac5f13a8b36876d1&_e=XMXx63hln5lpGxdPEoahz2lzE2vi-ZRizo4xn5aff6PSMdlbzfF244jB7P4G_w_vdqSJshaltvaishr7tSWg9reGbB_a9E_GdItoAaVb7IEjB4e6ZkVNOl823BiXLOFtbAeVal793qBeNpewMCWxWhjDfVb_Y4AZpYxp33z8kaLjqBNcWexlSP8QFZlEBSxr3hMyOKvpvlFpJxx_IX8xe_UNkOd9W5C3vjK_yv-oJXVPfGGhKAekY8Z5QK9SxQrzIl4OnlU0oqcCFDKmfQfyGO2NMtF8EcIzWunOnOYllneFttwX_ZhhBHO9o8j5AEpN96eH1NhX1IxT08kibNMnFkmN7qetiaSF38HCsNqVTUM2U5JbfwVy7clI-DtngbseaMds72ahQzSEeQB7rlDgVNIgjIlQ4kQFgG6KKp-367prlgijz9VpMSKguwaasDYvz5tlbPHSamkF2Ci54GkrlakSwz_D5Ny6F2wC3iM1k98%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

Saturdays during football season are special in college towns across the country. _However, there is nothing quite like Saturdays in Athens, Georgia, when the Bulldogs are playing - especially being a Bulldog on a Saturday night after a Georgia win. _

From the electric atmosphere on campus to the roar after every play - amplified by over 90,000 fans inside of the historic Sanford Stadium - I'd be lying, Fellow Conservative, if I told you I didn't miss it.

I've always felt fortunate to have had the opportunity to play for the Bulldogs. It was an opportunity I worked hard for and NEVER took for granted.

My time with the Bulldogs included a national championship and a Heisman Trophy, and it finished with my jersey number "34" being retired. **It was a TREMENDOUS HONOR, and I owe my success to my teammates and the support I received during my time in Athens.**

**[I'm reaching out to you today because I'm humbly asking for that same support again.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9c54633048e34810ac5f13a8b36876d1&_e=XMXx63hln5lpGxdPEoahz2lzE2vi-ZRizo4xn5aff6PSMdlbzfF244jB7P4G_w_vdqSJshaltvaishr7tSWg9reGbB_a9E_GdItoAaVb7IEjB4e6ZkVNOl823BiXLOFtbAeVal793qBeNpewMCWxWhjDfVb_Y4AZpYxp33z8kaLjqBNcWexlSP8QFZlEBSxr3hMyOKvpvlFpJxx_IX8xe_UNkOd9W5C3vjK_yv-oJXVPfGGhKAekY8Z5QK9SxQrzIl4OnlU0oqcCFDKmfQfyGGu1Gj_Di4hcKyDd5zfRVNdIOyKMSHmNOsZCECWAFNBDn-fPzm1XpgIKq6sUYdXLpgQy981gkn5FOR9oD_lF6WAavdhnicC1EQO3i18vidBXrcV0lkWzUvVTSInmnQxUj0Ca43dgi5yWra64502iCWLU8eA4XfFGua-lr8ep2OwrF073jsJQVOM2j7FxT3pX5bvycYrQrpdct2zzZHknHO0%3D) **

As you may know by now, I've switched playing fields and have jumped into the political arena. **[Fellow Conservative, I'm running for U.S. Senate in Georgia, and I'm asking for your support by making a contribution to my campaign of $5, $10, or even my favorite number- $34. Whatever you and your family can afford today will be deeply appreciated and greatly received.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9c54633048e34810ac5f13a8b36876d1&_e=XMXx63hln5lpGxdPEoahz2lzE2vi-ZRizo4xn5aff6PSMdlbzfF244jB7P4G_w_vdqSJshaltvaishr7tSWg9reGbB_a9E_GdItoAaVb7IEjB4e6ZkVNOl823BiXLOFtbAeVal793qBeNpewMCWxWhjDfVb_Y4AZpYxp33z8kaLjqBNcWexlSP8QFZlEBSxr3hMyOKvpvlFpJxx_IX8xe_UNkOd9W5C3vjK_yv-oJXVPfGGhKAekY8Z5QK9SxQrzIl4OnlU0oqcCFDKmfQfyGEFthfmRBcj6cNgv4vf4M_CTfYDE4rxtvfI8UjgWk__z1Jo0VltVg2PlTrhdxe8E-DT54IvRBnQtoRv5kNxW0Z72GhEn36X3JiVpBbIGvS-xUuMKUUYDDRkY5Tkfh6hbncrgH6e8hOL8tQNeaFn6VkpRRQy7l6ktA-WBSdaWrXfiNbK27ZCkkrcCi2KROizwFMzQZmg7lA83mnbs31YI3SE%3D)**

**[Support Team Herschel->](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9c54633048e34810ac5f13a8b36876d1&_e=XMXx63hln5lpGxdPEoahz2lzE2vi-ZRizo4xn5aff6PSMdlbzfF244jB7P4G_w_vdqSJshaltvaishr7tSWg9reGbB_a9E_GdItoAaVb7IEjB4e6ZkVNOl823BiXLOFtbAeVal793qBeNpewMCWxWhjDfVb_Y4AZpYxp33z8kaLjqBNcWexlSP8QFZlEBSxr3hMyOKvpvlFpJxx_IX8xe_UNkOd9W5C3vjK_yv-oJXVPfGGhKAekY8Z5QK9SxQrzIl4OnlU0oqcCFDKmfQfyGFAyv7PYi8ndoZmPdKC4gADj_sVQaE2nTdPVyV9ctW7MJer298Anc4w4eHGYuKKFvVGgmW5y8BU_l_zOWphgR94DUqHypOTphZidJOAS9uQMbQIiA8NhqQg06iZQLx7WGuupyL6-ofVLqMGzD3F7_W15xMLEMpcAi-YNNgqARdWsuSZLDLFQK1yqNXMc7v5GmWMSCKpmZFiWOHjSA8qHdI8%3D)**

Hearing tens of thousands of people singing Georgia's fight song - "Glory, Glory" - gave me the chills during my plays.

Fellow Conservative, my fight for the people of Georgia lives on.

My campaign to help Republicans WIN BACK the majority in the U.S. Senate is about making government smaller, personal responsibility, supporting our military, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity for the American Dream.

My Democrat opponent has taken the exact opposite approach. He has proven he WON'T be the voice of Georgians in the Senate and has instead aligned himself with career politicians who put their self-interests ahead of the people.

It was a team effort for us to reach our goals during my football career at Georgia, and I'm asking for that same team effort today. Please support our campaign and help us WIN THIS RACE and WIN BACK the Senate majority.

**[Every little bit helps. Even a couple of yards at a time achieves a first down, so $5, $10 or $34 today will give our campaign the boost it needs to WIN.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9c54633048e34810ac5f13a8b36876d1&_e=XMXx63hln5lpGxdPEoahz2lzE2vi-ZRizo4xn5aff6PSMdlbzfF244jB7P4G_w_vdqSJshaltvaishr7tSWg9reGbB_a9E_GdItoAaVb7IEjB4e6ZkVNOl823BiXLOFtbAeVal793qBeNpewMCWxWhjDfVb_Y4AZpYxp33z8kaLjqBNcWexlSP8QFZlEBSxr3hMyOKvpvlFpJxx_IX8xe_UNkOd9W5C3vjK_yv-oJXVPfGGhKAekY8Z5QK9SxQrzIl4OnlU0oqcCFDKmfQfyGCkOzogJzCSmUl1yr3uenFu7qUXUdnrS_cRSbiLGo_fLOcziKyRYMSmoHl6gN6z7YnqtNtyUDFhcYGZ3s6hie4FDLV0WnQjVD0S8XQI0DFefmjahSbcYAaB2Fbkt853QtxQXdX1jtL9MLqPQKH9vs88bowNsMuiOWeBzVY-I7FhTG7Cs1RMJSyVCWjflGBE595B1CFEw_YVeTaxV34_caqI%3D)**

Thanks,

Herschel Walker

clean_body: I'll never forget what it felt like to play for the Georgia Bulldogs on the historic Dooley Field at Sanford Stadium, in front of 90,000 screaming fan | Fellow Conservative, Saturdays during football season are special in college towns across the country. However, there is nothing quite like Saturdays in Athens, Georgia, when the Bulldogs are playing - especially being a Bulldog on a Saturday night after a Georgia win. From the electric atmosphere on campus to the roar after every play - amplified by over 90,000 fans inside of the historic Sanford Stadium - I'd be lying, Fellow Conservative, if I told you I didn't miss it. I've always felt fortunate to have had the opportunity to play for the Bulldogs. It was an opportunity I worked hard for and NEVER took for granted. My time with the Bulldogs included a national championship and a Heisman Trophy, and it finished with my jersey number "34" being retired. It was a TREMENDOUS HONOR, and I owe my success to my teammates and the support I received during my time in Athens. As you may know by now, I've switched playing fields and have jumped into the political arena. Hearing tens of thousands of people singing Georgia's fight song - "Glory, Glory" - gave me the chills during my plays. Fellow Conservative, my fight for the people of Georgia lives on. My campaign to help Republicans WIN BACK the majority in the U.S. Senate is about making government smaller, personal responsibility, supporting our military, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity for the American Dream. My Democrat opponent has taken the exact opposite approach. He has proven he WON'T be the voice of Georgians in the Senate and has instead aligned himself with career politicians who put their self-interests ahead of the people. It was a team effort for us to reach our goals during my football career at Georgia, and I'm asking for that same team effort today. Please support our campaign and help us WIN THIS RACE and WIN BACK the Senate majority. Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate P.S. Fellow Conservative, it's time to hunker down and win the day. Let's make sure this Saturday in Georgia is a success for Team Herschel. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Erica Smith HQ
subject: re: Our opponents
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Cheri Beasley’s devotion to the filibuster makes her the most conservative Democratic candidate for U.S. Senate in the country.
#
**It’s way, WAY past time for Senate Democrats to abolish the Jim Crow filibuster.**
The majority of Democrats, including Erica Smith, see the filibuster for what it is: A racist tool of oppression used by the GOP to block urgent change like protecting voting rights and expanding health care.
**But according to Cheri Beasley, our top Democratic opponent in this Senate primary, the Senate filibuster "Has in many ways benefited Democrats and people across North Carolina."**
_Ummm, what?_ Not only is that incorrect — it’s completely out of touch!
Erica Smith has always supported abolishing the filibuster, and she’d proudly vote to end it as the U.S. Senator from North Carolina. **_[Can you rush a contribution of $5 or more to help elect Erica Smith, a true progressive fighter, to the U.S. Senate in 2022?](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/13797?refcode=em20210904-416&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=416%2E3698%2EZo_kKD)___**
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/13797?refcode=em20210904-416&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=416%2E3698%2EZo_kKD)**
Our primary opponents, like Senators Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema, care more about corporate donors than doing the right thing for our democracy. This includes our opponent Jeff Jackson, who is "filibuster skeptical."
**In fact, Cheri Beasley’s devotion to the filibuster makes her the most conservative Democratic candidate for U.S. Senate in the country.**
Just look at the facts. Right now,_every single U.S. Senate candidate in Pennsylvania, Florida, and Ohio supports ending the filibuster._ The current sitting Democratic Senators in Georgia, Pennsylvania, Nevada — and even Montana — also support reforming or abolishing the filibuster.
**Meanwhile, Beasley and Jackson are standing with Senators Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema, committed to protecting a Jim Crow relic and tool of working class oppression.**
Erica Smith knows the Manchin-Sinema wing of the Democratic caucus is big enough. That’s why she’s running for U.S. Senate, and she needs our help.
[**_If you’re in a place to do so, can you make a $5 contribution to send Erica Smith to the U.S. Senate where she’ll be the 51st YES vote to abolish the filibuster? North Carolina deserves a leader who is ready to meet this moment and be the 51st vote on bold policies that will transform people's lives._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/13797?refcode=em20210904-416&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=416%2E3698%2EZo_kKD)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/13797?refcode=em20210904-416&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=416%2E3698%2EZo_kKD)**
Thanks for hearing us out,
Erica Smith HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210904-416-footer&t=23&refcode2=416_3698_Zo_kKD&akid=416%2E3698%2EZo_kKD)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

body:

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: What's happening in Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
I'm deeply concerned, friend. **Reproductive rights across the country are being threatened.** This week, the Supreme Court rejected an emergency request to block Texas's extreme abortion ban, essentially gutting _Roe v. Wade_ by blocking abortions after six weeks of pregnancy. What's happening in Texas is not an isolated event. Across the country, we're seeing access to reproductive health care being stripped away by Republican-led legislatures. Right here in New Hampshire, a restrictive abortion ban was signed into law, with no exceptions for rape or incest. **The right to abortion and contraception is a matter of personal autonomy, economic freedom, and health. I will always fight for a woman's right to access safe and affordable reproductive health care.** That’s why I joined colleagues in introducing the Women’s Health Protection Act to guarantee the right to access an abortion. **[Will you stand with me and protect access to abortion by adding your name in support of this vital legislation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35228953/304433316/1709436317?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmEwZjUxNi1kMzBkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Km2BXqSkBq69YPtKMZc5doiHALQ8Su8GcRF9AKOBe8=&emci=e138b908-040d-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=5ba0f516-d30d-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=5452893)** | | [Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35228954/304433317/1709436317?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmEwZjUxNi1kMzBkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Km2BXqSkBq69YPtKMZc5doiHALQ8Su8GcRF9AKOBe8=&emci=e138b908-040d-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=5ba0f516-d30d-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=5452893)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: There’s nothing quite like it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I'll never forget what it felt like to play for the Georgia Bulldogs on the historic Dooley Field at Sanford Stadium, in front of 90,000 screaming fan |
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a5866515e9a84b038f0895c7f90cc00c&_e=kl_jSMVB6t7nKhiDmXUBKHbvI2utNHKOhAWCbZzgZIPaGWc_Mf_cnTC0sgaz4bfIyrKrWrVv3WxGavBa5nkSoQopyh9XzVDdDtWhE-QsOvf5CxjGVxrUhJyVtNuKc68iHgMq7_swUJr_wefQvGFwH_lb9a4O9vBy1n4YEbQCMviegKAYw-BCkEXSsjBZy9e56hTA6iY--LvnLYyqgVWMmABMUmHtg1EYmk92zbkk5gEv-6ku-Vs13MuQW__HIoSip9GQsDPkcbvEBgqXiwhrGAThJ380UB2zrPfigkgtr0Y1vhsA7KSfprfscjY7QWozY-prVEp9VlQBZFJBF8_sMUMpUdKIGzK1PNlRllG-1jqXshJPMpEZicGFhOG-vQytUGsBDDf0fG7tRG_OLaYC-IW_2Sax7w5a1q8uyEstXzUL2WFR8xa4qGPhA3tBPr22IHrmFm7O-mxrpoYJCL6feErh3aORqAVnplcPxjaY7Ck%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

Saturdays during football season are special in college towns across the country. _However, there is nothing quite like Saturdays in Athens, Georgia, when the Bulldogs are playing - especially being a Bulldog on a Saturday night after a Georgia win. _

From the electric atmosphere on campus to the roar after every play - amplified by over 90,000 fans inside of the historic Sanford Stadium - I'd be lying, Fellow Conservative, if I told you I didn't miss it.

I've always felt fortunate to have had the opportunity to play for the Bulldogs. It was an opportunity I worked hard for and NEVER took for granted.

My time with the Bulldogs included a national championship and a Heisman Trophy, and it finished with my jersey number "34" being retired. **It was a TREMENDOUS HONOR, and I owe my success to my teammates and the support I received during my time in Athens.**

**[I'm reaching out to you today because I'm humbly asking for that same support again.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a5866515e9a84b038f0895c7f90cc00c&_e=kl_jSMVB6t7nKhiDmXUBKHbvI2utNHKOhAWCbZzgZIPaGWc_Mf_cnTC0sgaz4bfIyrKrWrVv3WxGavBa5nkSoQopyh9XzVDdDtWhE-QsOvf5CxjGVxrUhJyVtNuKc68iHgMq7_swUJr_wefQvGFwH_lb9a4O9vBy1n4YEbQCMviegKAYw-BCkEXSsjBZy9e56hTA6iY--LvnLYyqgVWMmABMUmHtg1EYmk92zbkk5gEv-6ku-Vs13MuQW__HIoSip9GQsDPkcbvEBgqXiwhrGMuCjpXD5Zrfj7dVFeJi5jT29WIdHuYBMFln5PtT0R9aKbmvT4J50YioeLTqIXTD2wMJ0w3mLW5jHSBz__bCfYNx8mWJEfKqhqFAY51NmNd9jmTFcmShlwNj57FX31V8S7YG35_Akl-OhdmZaZ1SZ1eWt1jrME6zr0JzykMqoISBlo_YB6vWyEiUCBsS2NZiwD4_BAixrKxjnI5P4dv6Jq8%3D) **

As you may know by now, I've switched playing fields and have jumped into the political arena. **[Fellow Conservative, I'm running for U.S. Senate in Georgia, and I'm asking for your support by making a contribution to my campaign of $5, $10, or even my favorite number- $34. Whatever you and your family can afford today will be deeply appreciated and greatly received.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a5866515e9a84b038f0895c7f90cc00c&_e=kl_jSMVB6t7nKhiDmXUBKHbvI2utNHKOhAWCbZzgZIPaGWc_Mf_cnTC0sgaz4bfIyrKrWrVv3WxGavBa5nkSoQopyh9XzVDdDtWhE-QsOvf5CxjGVxrUhJyVtNuKc68iHgMq7_swUJr_wefQvGFwH_lb9a4O9vBy1n4YEbQCMviegKAYw-BCkEXSsjBZy9e56hTA6iY--LvnLYyqgVWMmABMUmHtg1EYmk92zbkk5gEv-6ku-Vs13MuQW__HIoSip9GQsDPkcbvEBgqXiwhrGPVQsUTFirBMhQ1sdJQLJ0HPf-4TmIa0y4726GoBI_blQwxn56BeP2Ut3FH8b4UInGreN1coHuhDJ2MEepTBlWccOuxUhcRJM37QGDvQQztmKYfFLn0Qu22sYm23G2WUn5xOvlszAWKRFOAdguuVxl_LKPaj70A1mSi-cCQrTzEC08eyKZYs7_XTvZ2a8hXlAGAmrPopz_8wuzEfYVP9TSs%3D)**

Hearing tens of thousands of people singing Georgia's fight song - "Glory, Glory" - gave me the chills during my plays.

Fellow Conservative, my fight for the people of Georgia lives on.

My campaign to help Republicans WIN BACK the majority in the U.S. Senate is about making government smaller, personal responsibility, supporting our military, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity for the American Dream.

My Democrat opponent has taken the exact opposite approach. He has proven he WON'T be the voice of Georgians in the Senate and has instead aligned himself with career politicians who put their self-interests ahead of the people.

It was a team effort for us to reach our goals during my football career at Georgia, and I'm asking for that same team effort today. Please support our campaign and help us WIN THIS RACE and WIN BACK the Senate majority.

**[Every little bit helps. Even a couple of yards at a time achieves a first down, so $5, $10 or $34 today will give our campaign the boost it needs to WIN.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a5866515e9a84b038f0895c7f90cc00c&_e=kl_jSMVB6t7nKhiDmXUBKHbvI2utNHKOhAWCbZzgZIPaGWc_Mf_cnTC0sgaz4bfIyrKrWrVv3WxGavBa5nkSoQopyh9XzVDdDtWhE-QsOvf5CxjGVxrUhJyVtNuKc68iHgMq7_swUJr_wefQvGFwH_lb9a4O9vBy1n4YEbQCMviegKAYw-BCkEXSsjBZy9e56hTA6iY--LvnLYyqgVWMmABMUmHtg1EYmk92zbkk5gEv-6ku-Vs13MuQW__HIoSip9GQsDPkcbvEBgqXiwhrGFFV16T7ZO02PJo6ILK8VLS4hiOHHtojRLrT1LzTqeJmG8g2WIzFjEIduwjh2ktDoBUxKtill8yMypHchwqUZmBfY9xWWfplxLsgdAv0VNtEMCJL0Q7379sZjSZ36mNZdDYgtMFCH2W2lKlmGr0giaoE8Fc91T61Ks32JN0gWQPUfq8f9VkjSd4N0CgqKY7LiyXFL6SenST1XxcI16jIOH0%3D)**

clean_body: This morning Team Trump texted us asking about YOU, Peter. | TEAM TRUMP JUST TEXTED US ASKING ABOUT YOU! Peter, We couldn’t believe it ... but this morning Team Trump texted us asking about YOU. They said YOUR NAME IS STILL MISSING and that President Trump is asking about YOU. Peter, we really couldn’t believe that YOUR NAME was mentioned this morning. You’re one of President Trump’s most loyal supporters. Please don’t make President Trump wait any longer. If YOU DONATE RIGHT NOW President Trump will see your name on the list of donors we send over to him. It will also directly impact whether we can PROTECT Trump’s legacy and also WIN BACK the Senate majority. | THIS IS YOUR LAST CHANCE. I’m humbled by the support I’ve received so far in this race ‐‐ _from the crowded primary to today less than two months out from making history!_

But as we inch closer to Election Day, the stakes keep climbing.

**Safeguarding the right to vote** is at stake in two months.
**Access to abortion care** is at stake in two months.
**Affordable health care** is at stake in two months.

And with early voting starting in a matter of weeks, we can’t ignore the stakes of this election! The next two months are when this race will be won.

clean_body: Less than a cup of coffee! | = Peter, Election Day in Virginia is in less than two months! = | = I’m humbled by the support I’ve received so far in this race ‐‐ from the crowded primary to today less than two months out from making history! But as we inch closer to Election Day, the stakes keep climbing. Safeguarding the right to vote is at stake in two months. Access to abortion care is at stake in two months. Affordable health care is at stake in two months. And with early voting starting in a matter of weeks, we can’t ignore the stakes of this election! The next two months are when this race will be won. = = = = = = Thanks for standing with me in this fight, Peter. = Hala Ayala Democratic Nominee for Virginia Lt. 1. **Ohio’s open Senate seat could decide if we’re able to hold our slim Democratic Senate majority.** With a 50/50 split, we can’t afford to lose a single battleground race like this one.

2. **National Republicans are already pouring millions of dollars into this race.** One right-wing billionaire alone dropped $10 million into a Super PAC.

3. **I have multiple Republican opponents—not one of them is looking out for the working class.** We need to elect a Senator who will fight to cut workers in on the deal, not leave them behind.

4. **We’re closing in on our deadline, and we need to post strong fundraising numbers.**

clean_body: | | | Derek, we’re facing a big deadline, and I’m about to ask you to between my grassroots Senate campaign and Common Good. But first, a few facts about my race: 1. Ohio’s open Senate seat could decide if we’re able to hold our slim Democratic Senate majority. With a 50/50 split, we can’t afford to lose a single battleground race like this one. 2. National Republicans are already pouring millions of dollars into this race. One right-wing billionaire alone dropped $10 million into a Super PAC. 3. I have multiple Republican opponents—not one of them is looking out for the working class. We need to elect a Senator who will fight to cut workers in on the deal, not leave them behind. 4. We’re closing in on our deadline, and we need to post strong fundraising numbers. | Together, I know we can pull this off. -Tim Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

Now, he and his Republicans have $102 MILLION in their war chest to unload during the midterms.

name: Caitlyn for California
subject: We Only Have Two Weeks.
body:
| | Friend, **It’s almost time.** The election is just **two weeks away** and I need your support now more than ever. _Can I count on you to step up?_ Californians have watched Gavin Newsom destroy our beautiful state for too long. Our one chance to **TAKE BACK** California is right around the corner. We must recall Newsom to save California. With so little time left, I’m only reaching out to my TOP supporters to ask for their help. **That includes YOU, Friend.** I need your support to finish this race and WIN. _Will you join me?_

body:
I’ve officially launched my campaign for United States Senate, and I want to personally share why I am running. Watch Now >> |
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=deae63bee7104f5d96633855d9ba0a09&_e=bZRAIRFIkezl3SjJqS-sWAQqEAJqympKHZvs0IwB5WAb66BRKcxdqebixESjHW1SKMk9APYRWVUDAtFjEqchvnQfVMo2VQf5OUuHOnT5QjhuH5tlAiEiz2fsrEYOcwAAqx6qezvjexwAKW1tdIV3WNVWlWCfrjb9zhPxNxeUWYPQVgD7Yt-1tdbX26ND83kWNy0KlIZjAC913WxmsoKgEc0D9EmaxImCVM3oQwUDv9PXg-66lYUI8Ag2j32S3Ik0HAZLHArobKLEXfxNN31LuaIsnDG_u4dZdfmuuWLI4sts6Av-dmwE84BUYy8maw5NVK1LKbG8jFrXBHhMzzgtARU8_Q85p9LHmMt6dTkCaALoFUBceSW1Dh94FOo1_RviOt9oL_3z6AttvIuEaP59QejspNDAmZo7-SkTGP8FFoC6-N2AGK9L7pVnYjEuaHyzmWfCt5qsJtETxRF6dNXBQilLuyWBhYqXr6pxoG1xjWsu2a3HImRtlXz3vOvRsXWJ)

---
Peter,

Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream.

He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League.

That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams.

**[I officially launched my campaign for the United States Senate- and I want to tell you why I am running.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=deae63bee7104f5d96633855d9ba0a09&_e=bZRAIRFIkezl3SjJqS-sWAQqEAJqympKHZvs0IwB5WAb66BRKcxdqebixESjHW1SKMk9APYRWVUDAtFjEqchvnQfVMo2VQf5OUuHOnT5QjhuH5tlAiEiz2fsrEYOcwAAqx6qezvjexwAKW1tdIV3WNVWlWCfrjb9zhPxNxeUWYPQVgD7Yt-1tdbX26ND83kWNy0KlIZjAC913WxmsoKgEc0D9EmaxImCVM3oQwUDv9PXg-66lYUI8Ag2j32S3Ik0HAZLHArobKLEXfxNN31LuaIsnDG_u4dZdfmuuWLI4stOCsaKRA7sLtFvCYWZQPOsGt20z-Jt74xszBdbIfwA_w8eyZwfWbDXI0GfMFV2ZKmG_LaCvl4N8H2Hf8xWbGAodWFh_BpXUAqbeIGSyKdNCDv7AMYMKFJRdel6JySgSUyUXY2VfUBrcor4F2SEuro31G0zHeuYphiddDVVLxTvzNjO4v3uEhwE589nk6OWl33ePoa9VDezOFGBQq47bSfD)**

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=deae63bee7104f5d96633855d9ba0a09&_e=bZRAIRFIkezl3SjJqS-sWAQqEAJqympKHZvs0IwB5WAb66BRKcxdqebixESjHW1SKMk9APYRWVUDAtFjEqchvnQfVMo2VQf5OUuHOnT5QjhuH5tlAiEiz2fsrEYOcwAAqx6qezvjexwAKW1tdIV3WNVWlWCfrjb9zhPxNxeUWYPQVgD7Yt-1tdbX26ND83kWNy0KlIZjAC913WxmsoKgEc0D9EmaxImCVM3oQwUDv9PXg-66lYUI8Ag2j32S3Ik0HAZLHArobKLEXfxNN31LuaIsnDG_u4dZdfmuuWLI4ssC-69kOVsOn4fmyE0NXCL7pdnuaXXfHp0Y1rtH_wXQnqjZ6DKmqmzbaJTrNID9ZgGqjGAiGmFro1GgT_n-puvjJsrur2NN09109V0EINTtsoIR-77E1P68gBoe00U9DkYUs0ixbnMZya8XMIDoEwg0sDqzbqLx2_Qw4O4YYIp6QT1767e7wORKzk6ANg-l7FnBhWvXqG_TSLMlngUXa-4D)
From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams.

But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground.

_It's time for that to change._

Peter, I am proud to call myself a conservative.

I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility.

I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did.

I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us.

**[I want you to hear directly from me about why I'm running for the United States Senate, so I am asking you to please watch my campaign video.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=deae63bee7104f5d96633855d9ba0a09&_e=bZRAIRFIkezl3SjJqS-sWAQqEAJqympKHZvs0IwB5WAb66BRKcxdqebixESjHW1SKMk9APYRWVUDAtFjEqchvnQfVMo2VQf5OUuHOnT5QjhuH5tlAiEiz2fsrEYOcwAAqx6qezvjexwAKW1tdIV3WNVWlWCfrjb9zhPxNxeUWYPQVgD7Yt-1tdbX26ND83kWNy0KlIZjAC913WxmsoKgEc0D9EmaxImCVM3oQwUDv9PXg-66lYUI8Ag2j32S3Ik0HAZLHArobKLEXfxNN31LuaIsnDG_u4dZdfmuuWLI4surL8zA3EspNiWLt5kce9CjrPDKto-N7Th4tY1-U3xSC957GiVFjosCa-WnMmvUwnY95kM4VL262EYiNMxjks4Yvg6ANQLqu32nkCzVM4O47lhxvP6z9vMVUQqNiodzpIZ7Qv-UqqveO0C8Qog8UxjfK5hA9ZfZoaezB5V7fx3YN7EGVyFjiAvpEvLGHxoMV9OzlbErLPSA_NmBKxBiiNty) **

Peter, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support.

Sincerely,
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=deae63bee7104f5d96633855d9ba0a09&_e=bZRAIRFIkezl3SjJqS-sWAQqEAJqympKHZvs0IwB5WAb66BRKcxdqebixESjHW1SKMk9APYRWVUDAtFjEqchvnQfVMo2VQf5OUuHOnT5QjhuH5tlAiEiz2fsrEYOcwAAqx6qezvjexwAKW1tdIV3WNVWlWCfrjb9zhPxNxeUWYPQVgD7Yt-1tdbX26ND83kWNy0KlIZjAC913WxmsoKgEc0D9EmaxImCVM3oQwUDv9PXg-66lYUI8Ag2j32S3Ik0HAZLHArobKLEXfxNN31LuaIsnDG_u4dZdfmuuWLI4suEyvCrpv90asWXaAlcyioBLxfkpc6hqecM4w8ySCuGTRxNtPyVS3b6Ft1cRyt7Iarw-rgyC_agoZD9JIKBfatR7sFmIKKUX3t9FcqL6meKpspokIabjEQhwupvKSn2reITJ3saRYu_n6xpWw7gTO9fASTpMfJxDYploSLTObyMNQQ9mKjtw2ypgv8D02_ECYjw8Pa4INEGickfruRiJJDi)

We hate to see you go, but [you can unsubscribe here](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_s=deae63bee7104f5d96633855d9ba0a09&_t=TKJ3qy1HJR-BATaeahCWhJV4y9DyiBpLMbJeoCiX-NqVTJTpXNfR9by2IIjY-RFCsA_kUmUP_PVHIuZw4l9ovGPagD9CUNI9db5XD6L-MsulCq18pzdPXsQsIKkUTtJAvC7dWx8o_cV1Io9p4Trd0mOPSLn46YjZfRWa_trwVLw%3D)._
clean_body: I’ve officially launched my campaign for United States Senate, and I want to personally share why I am running. Watch Now >> | Peter, Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream. He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League. That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams. From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams. But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground. It's time for that to change. Peter, I am proud to call myself a conservative. I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility. I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did. I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us. Peter, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support. Sincerely, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate P.S. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

clean_body: This is NOT the email we wanted to send you. | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Sorry. This is NOT the email we wanted to send you. We thought Democrats would rush to save Newsom after Rachel Maddow issued an urgent warning about the recall in California. | | We thought Democrats would act when we told you a Trump-loving MAGA extremist is on the verge of becoming the next Governor of California. | We thought Democrats would rush to help when we told you we needed 2,000 donations to save Gavin Newsom and stop the Republican take over. | But donations have come to a STOP. If we can’t hit our goal by tonight, all hope will be lost and Gov. Newsom could LOSE. The election is just 10 DAYS AWAY... Gavin Newsom could LOSE to an anti-science, anti-vaccine, pro-Trump lunatic! | | | | | | | Thanks so much, \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you.
